---
title: "PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN"
author: "Sarah Moseley"
date: "2026-05-07"
output: html_documenthtml_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: readable
---

## Setup

```{r}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "tidyr",
  "stringr",
  "readr",
  "purrr",
  "tibble",
  "RColorBrewer",
  "uwot",
  "dbscan"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !sapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)
]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required packages: ",
    paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "),
    "\nInstall them before running this workflow."
  )
}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(uwot)
library(dbscan)

```

## User Settings

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input files
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# Corrected combined Tukey object
# This should be the fixed combined file where ADRIFT_003_Event_001 has already been corrected.
combined_file <- file.choose()

# Previously generated click-level ICI table
# This should come from your ICI workflow:
# click_metadata_with_ici_NEW.rds
ici_file <- file.choose()

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folder
# ------------------------------------------------------------

output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN"

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "plots")
data_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "data")
table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "tables")

dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(data_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Spectral settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

freq_min_khz <- 19
freq_max_khz <- 50

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# ICI filtering settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_min_s <- 0.01
ici_max_s <- 0.4

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sampling settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

clicks_per_event <- 200
sampling_seed <- 123

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

fixed_n_pcs <- 5
variance_cutoffs <- c(0.90, 0.95)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# UMAP settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_neighbors <- 30
umap_min_dist <- 0.1
umap_metric <- "euclidean"
umap_seed <- 123

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# HDBSCAN settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_minPts <- 30

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Concatenated spectrogram settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

max_clicks_per_cluster_spectrogram <- 300
cluster_spectrogram_seed <- 456

cat("Output directory:\n")
cat(output_dir, "\n")

```

## Load Combined Tukey and ICI Tables

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load corrected combined Tukey object
# ------------------------------------------------------------

combined_tukey <- readRDS(combined_file)

cat("Loaded combined_tukey object.\n")
cat("Number of events:", length(combined_tukey), "\n\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load click-level ICI table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

click_metadata_with_ici <- readRDS(ici_file)

cat("Loaded click_metadata_with_ici object.\n")
cat("Rows in ICI table:", nrow(click_metadata_with_ici), "\n\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Preview structures
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Class of combined_tukey:\n")
print(class(combined_tukey))

cat("\nClass of first event object:\n")
print(class(combined_tukey[[1]]))

cat("\nNames in first event object:\n")
print(names(combined_tukey[[1]]))

cat("\nColumns in click_metadata_with_ici:\n")
print(names(click_metadata_with_ici))

```

## Sanity Checks for Combined Tukey Structure

```{r}

event_structure_summary <- data.frame(
  
  EventIndex = seq_along(combined_tukey),
  
  EventID = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) x$EventID),
  
  n_freq = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) length(x$freq)),
  
  n_uid = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) length(x$UID)),
  
  allSpec_rows = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) dim(x$allSpec)[1]),
  
  allSpec_cols = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) dim(x$allSpec)[2]),
  
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(event_structure_summary)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Total click count
# ------------------------------------------------------------

total_clicks <- sum(event_structure_summary$allSpec_cols)

cat("\nTotal clicks across all events:", total_clicks, "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Core dimension checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

uid_matches_allSpec <- all(
  event_structure_summary$n_uid ==
    event_structure_summary$allSpec_cols
)

freq_matches_allSpec <- all(
  event_structure_summary$n_freq ==
    event_structure_summary$allSpec_rows
)

cat("\nUID count matches allSpec columns:\n")
print(uid_matches_allSpec)

cat("\nFrequency count matches allSpec rows:\n")
print(freq_matches_allSpec)

if (uid_matches_allSpec && freq_matches_allSpec) {
  
  cat("\nPASS: Core spectral dimensions are aligned.\n")
  
} else {
  
  stop("FAIL: Spectral dimensions are misaligned.")
}

```

## Check for Duplicated EventIDs and UID Problems

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build click-level metadata from Tukey object
# ------------------------------------------------------------

click_metadata_from_tukey <- list()

for (i in seq_along(combined_tukey)) {
  
  event_obj <- combined_tukey[[i]]
  
  n_clicks <- ncol(event_obj$allSpec)
  
  click_metadata_from_tukey[[i]] <- data.frame(
    
    EventIndex = i,
    
    EventID = event_obj$EventID,
    
    UID = as.character(event_obj$UID),
    
    ClickIndexWithinEvent = seq_len(n_clicks),
    
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

click_metadata_from_tukey <- bind_rows(click_metadata_from_tukey)

cat("Rows in Tukey click metadata:",
    nrow(click_metadata_from_tukey), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Duplicate EventID check
# ------------------------------------------------------------

duplicate_event_ids <- click_metadata_from_tukey %>%
  distinct(EventIndex, EventID) %>%
  count(EventID, name = "n_rows") %>%
  filter(n_rows > 1)

cat("\nDuplicated EventIDs:\n")
print(duplicate_event_ids)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Duplicate UID within EventID
# ------------------------------------------------------------

duplicate_uid_within_event <- click_metadata_from_tukey %>%
  count(EventID, UID, name = "n_rows") %>%
  filter(n_rows > 1)

cat("\nDuplicated UID values within EventID:\n")
print(duplicate_uid_within_event)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PASS / FAIL checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

if (nrow(duplicate_event_ids) == 0) {
  
  cat("\nPASS: No duplicated EventIDs.\n")
  
} else {
  
  stop("FAIL: Duplicated EventIDs detected.")
}

if (nrow(duplicate_uid_within_event) == 0) {
  
  cat("\nPASS: No duplicated UID values within events.\n")
  
} else {
  
  stop("FAIL: Duplicated UID values detected within events.")
}

```

## Inspect Frequency Grids Before Interpolation

```{r}

freq_grid_summary <- data.frame(
  EventIndex = seq_along(combined_tukey),
  EventID = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) x$EventID),
  n_freq = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) length(x$freq)),
  min_freq = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) min(x$freq, na.rm = TRUE)),
  max_freq = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) max(x$freq, na.rm = TRUE)),
  median_freq_step = sapply(combined_tukey, function(x) median(diff(x$freq), na.rm = TRUE)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(freq_grid_summary)

write.csv(
  freq_grid_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "frequency_grid_summary_before_interpolation.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Check whether all frequency grids are already identical
reference_freq_original <- combined_tukey[[1]]$freq

all_freq_grids_identical <- all(
  sapply(
    combined_tukey,
    function(x) identical(x$freq, reference_freq_original)
  )
)

cat("\nAre all original frequency grids identical?\n")
print(all_freq_grids_identical)

```

## Interpolate All Events to Shared Frequency Grid

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Use first event frequency grid as reference
# ------------------------------------------------------------

reference_freq <- combined_tukey[[1]]$freq

cat("Reference grid length:", length(reference_freq), "\n")
cat("Reference min frequency:", min(reference_freq), "\n")
cat("Reference max frequency:", max(reference_freq), "\n")
cat("Reference median step:", median(diff(reference_freq)), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function: interpolate one matrix to reference grid
# ------------------------------------------------------------

interpolate_spectra_matrix <- function(original_freq, spectra_matrix, reference_freq) {
  
  interpolated_matrix <- apply(
    spectra_matrix,
    2,
    function(one_spectrum) {
      approx(
        x = original_freq,
        y = one_spectrum,
        xout = reference_freq,
        method = "linear",
        rule = 2
      )$y
    }
  )
  
  return(interpolated_matrix)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Interpolate each event
# ------------------------------------------------------------

interpolated_tukey <- vector("list", length(combined_tukey))

for (i in seq_along(combined_tukey)) {
  
  event_obj <- combined_tukey[[i]]
  
  cat("\nInterpolating event", i, "of", length(combined_tukey), ":",
      event_obj$EventID, "\n")
  
  interpolated_allSpec <- interpolate_spectra_matrix(
    original_freq = event_obj$freq,
    spectra_matrix = event_obj$allSpec,
    reference_freq = reference_freq
  )
  
  interpolated_tukey[[i]] <- event_obj
  interpolated_tukey[[i]]$freq <- reference_freq
  interpolated_tukey[[i]]$allSpec <- interpolated_allSpec
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity check: all interpolated grids identical
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_interpolated_grids_identical <- all(
  sapply(
    interpolated_tukey,
    function(x) identical(x$freq, reference_freq)
  )
)

cat("\nAre all interpolated frequency grids identical?\n")
print(all_interpolated_grids_identical)

if (all_interpolated_grids_identical) {
  cat("\nPASS: All events now share the same frequency grid.\n")
} else {
  stop("FAIL: Frequency-grid interpolation did not align all events.")
}

```

## Restrict Spectra to 19-50 kHz

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Convert reference frequency grid to kHz if needed
# ------------------------------------------------------------

if (max(reference_freq, na.rm = TRUE) > 1000) {
  reference_freq_khz <- reference_freq / 1000
  cat("Detected frequency grid in Hz. Converted to kHz.\n")
} else {
  reference_freq_khz <- reference_freq
  cat("Detected frequency grid already in kHz.\n")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Identify frequency bins inside target range
# ------------------------------------------------------------

freq_keep <- reference_freq_khz >= freq_min_khz & reference_freq_khz <= freq_max_khz

freq_focus <- reference_freq_khz[freq_keep]

cat("Frequency range requested:", freq_min_khz, "to", freq_max_khz, "kHz\n")
cat("Number of frequency bins retained:", length(freq_focus), "\n")

if (length(freq_focus) > 0) {
  cat("Actual minimum retained frequency:", min(freq_focus), "kHz\n")
  cat("Actual maximum retained frequency:", max(freq_focus), "kHz\n")
}

if (length(freq_focus) < 2) {
  stop("Too few frequency bins retained. Check frequency units and freq_min_khz/freq_max_khz.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save retained frequency grid
# ------------------------------------------------------------

freq_focus_table <- data.frame(
  FreqBin = seq_along(freq_focus),
  Frequency_kHz = freq_focus,
  Frequency_OriginalUnits = reference_freq[freq_keep]
)

write.csv(
  freq_focus_table,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "frequency_grid_19_50_khz.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

## Build Click-By-Frequency Spectral Matrix

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build one click-level spectral matrix and matching metadata table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_list <- vector("list", length(interpolated_tukey))
metadata_list <- vector("list", length(interpolated_tukey))

for (i in seq_along(interpolated_tukey)) {
  
  event_obj <- interpolated_tukey[[i]]
  
  # allSpec is frequency x click
  # First restrict to 19–50 kHz frequency bins, then transpose:
  # rows = clicks, columns = frequency bins
  spectra_focus_event <- t(event_obj$allSpec[freq_keep, , drop = FALSE])
  
  spectra_list[[i]] <- spectra_focus_event
  
  metadata_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    EventIndex = i,
    EventID = event_obj$EventID,
    DriftID = sub("_Event_.*$", "", event_obj$EventID),
    UID = as.character(event_obj$UID),
    ClickIndexWithinEvent = seq_len(ncol(event_obj$allSpec)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine all events into one matrix/table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_matrix <- do.call(rbind, spectra_list)
spectra_metadata <- bind_rows(metadata_list)

# Use kHz labels from corrected Chunk 9
colnames(spectra_matrix) <- paste0(
  "freq_",
  sprintf("%.3f", freq_focus),
  "_kHz"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Rows in spectra matrix:", nrow(spectra_matrix), "\n")
cat("Columns in spectra matrix:", ncol(spectra_matrix), "\n")
cat("Rows in spectra metadata:", nrow(spectra_metadata), "\n")

if (nrow(spectra_matrix) != nrow(spectra_metadata)) {
  stop("FAIL: Spectra matrix rows do not match metadata rows.")
} else {
  cat("\nPASS: Spectra matrix and metadata rows are aligned.\n")
}

if (ncol(spectra_matrix) != length(freq_focus)) {
  stop("FAIL: Spectra matrix columns do not match retained frequency bins.")
} else {
  cat("PASS: Spectra matrix columns match retained frequency bins.\n")
}

cat("\nPreview spectra metadata:\n")
print(head(spectra_metadata))

cat("\nSpectra matrix dimensions:\n")
print(dim(spectra_matrix))

```

## Sanity Check Spectra Values

```{r}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Basic matrix checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Spectra matrix dimensions:\n")
print(dim(spectra_matrix))

cat("\nNumber of NA values in spectra matrix:\n")
print(sum(is.na(spectra_matrix)))

cat("\nNumber of infinite / non-finite values in spectra matrix:\n")
print(sum(!is.finite(spectra_matrix)))

if (sum(is.na(spectra_matrix)) > 0 || sum(!is.finite(spectra_matrix)) > 0) {
  stop("FAIL: Spectra matrix contains NA, NaN, or infinite values.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Check per-click min/max values
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_row_min <- apply(spectra_matrix, 1, min, na.rm = TRUE)
spectra_row_max <- apply(spectra_matrix, 1, max, na.rm = TRUE)
spectra_row_range <- spectra_row_max - spectra_row_min

cat("\nSummary of per-click minimum values:\n")
print(summary(spectra_row_min))

cat("\nSummary of per-click maximum values:\n")
print(summary(spectra_row_max))

cat("\nSummary of per-click spectral ranges:\n")
print(summary(spectra_row_range))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Flag flat spectra, if any
# ------------------------------------------------------------

flat_spectra_rows <- which(spectra_row_range == 0)

cat("\nNumber of flat spectra rows:", length(flat_spectra_rows), "\n")

if (length(flat_spectra_rows) > 0) {
  
  cat("\nWARNING: Some spectra have zero range across retained frequencies.\n")
  cat("These may cause issues later if additional scaling is applied.\n")
  
  flat_spectra_table <- spectra_metadata[flat_spectra_rows, ]
  
  write.csv(
    flat_spectra_table,
    file = file.path(table_dir, "flat_spectra_rows_19_50_khz.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save row-level min/max diagnostics
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_row_diagnostics <- spectra_metadata %>%
  mutate(
    row_min_19_50_khz = spectra_row_min,
    row_max_19_50_khz = spectra_row_max,
    row_range_19_50_khz = spectra_row_range
  )

write.csv(
  spectra_row_diagnostics,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "spectra_row_min_max_diagnostics_19_50_khz.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nPASS: Spectra matrix contains finite values only.\n")

```

## Min-Max Normalize Spectra Across 19-50 kHz

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Min-max normalize each click spectrum across 19–50 kHz
#
# rows = clicks
# columns = frequency bins
#
# Formula:
# normalized = (value - row_min) / (row_max - row_min)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_row_min <- apply(spectra_matrix, 1, min, na.rm = TRUE)
spectra_row_max <- apply(spectra_matrix, 1, max, na.rm = TRUE)
spectra_row_range <- spectra_row_max - spectra_row_min

if (any(spectra_row_range == 0)) {
  stop("Some spectra have zero range and cannot be min-max normalized.")
}

spectra_matrix_minmax <- sweep(
  spectra_matrix,
  1,
  spectra_row_min,
  FUN = "-"
)

spectra_matrix_minmax <- sweep(
  spectra_matrix_minmax,
  1,
  spectra_row_range,
  FUN = "/"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

minmax_row_min <- apply(spectra_matrix_minmax, 1, min, na.rm = TRUE)
minmax_row_max <- apply(spectra_matrix_minmax, 1, max, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Min-max normalized spectra dimensions:\n")
print(dim(spectra_matrix_minmax))

cat("\nSummary of normalized per-click minimum values:\n")
print(summary(minmax_row_min))

cat("\nSummary of normalized per-click maximum values:\n")
print(summary(minmax_row_max))

cat("\nNumber of NA values in normalized spectra:\n")
print(sum(is.na(spectra_matrix_minmax)))

cat("\nNumber of non-finite values in normalized spectra:\n")
print(sum(!is.finite(spectra_matrix_minmax)))

if (sum(is.na(spectra_matrix_minmax)) > 0 || sum(!is.finite(spectra_matrix_minmax)) > 0) {
  stop("FAIL: Min-max normalized spectra contain NA, NaN, or infinite values.")
}

cat("\nPASS: Spectra are now min-max normalized across 19–50 kHz.\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save diagnostics
# ------------------------------------------------------------

minmax_diagnostics <- spectra_metadata %>%
  mutate(
    raw_min_19_50_khz = spectra_row_min,
    raw_max_19_50_khz = spectra_row_max,
    raw_range_19_50_khz = spectra_row_range,
    minmax_min_19_50_khz = minmax_row_min,
    minmax_max_19_50_khz = minmax_row_max
  )

write.csv(
  minmax_diagnostics,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "minmax_normalization_diagnostics_19_50_khz.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

## Join ICI to Spectra Metadata

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Prepare ICI table for joining
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_for_join <- click_metadata_with_ici %>%
  mutate(
    UID = as.character(UID)
  ) %>%
  select(
    EventID,
    UID,
    DriftID,
    Final_UTC_clean,
    Final_UTC_ms,
    ICI_to_next_ms,
    ICI_to_next_flag,
    ICI_from_previous_ms,
    ICI_from_previous_flag,
    IsFirstClickInEvent,
    IsLastClickInEvent
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Check ICI table uniqueness before join
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_duplicate_check <- ici_for_join %>%
  count(EventID, UID, name = "n_rows") %>%
  filter(n_rows > 1)

cat("Duplicated EventID + UID rows in ICI table:\n")
print(ici_duplicate_check)

if (nrow(ici_duplicate_check) > 0) {
  stop("FAIL: ICI table has duplicated EventID + UID rows.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join ICI table to spectra metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_metadata_with_ici <- spectra_metadata %>%
  left_join(
    ici_for_join,
    by = c("EventID", "UID"),
    suffix = c("_spectra", "_ici")
  )

cat("Rows before join:", nrow(spectra_metadata), "\n")
cat("Rows after join:", nrow(spectra_metadata_with_ici), "\n")

if (nrow(spectra_metadata_with_ici) != nrow(spectra_metadata)) {
  stop("FAIL: ICI join changed the number of rows.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create ICI in seconds
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_metadata_with_ici <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  mutate(
    ICI_to_next_s = ICI_to_next_ms / 1000,
    log10_ICI_to_next_s = log10(ICI_to_next_s)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join coverage checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("\nRows missing ICI_to_next_ms:\n")
print(sum(is.na(spectra_metadata_with_ici$ICI_to_next_ms)))

cat("\nICI_to_next_flag counts:\n")
print(table(spectra_metadata_with_ici$ICI_to_next_flag, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\nSummary of ICI_to_next_s:\n")
print(summary(spectra_metadata_with_ici$ICI_to_next_s))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save joined metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  spectra_metadata_with_ici,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "spectra_metadata_with_ici.rds")
)

write.csv(
  spectra_metadata_with_ici,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "spectra_metadata_with_ici.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nPASS: ICI metadata joined to spectra metadata.\n")

```

## Inspect ICI Filtering Effect

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Label clicks by ICI filter category
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_metadata_with_ici <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  mutate(
    ICI_filter_category = case_when(
      is.na(ICI_to_next_s) ~ "missing_ici",
      ICI_to_next_s == 0 ~ "zero_ici",
      ICI_to_next_s < ici_min_s ~ "below_0.01_s_likely_buzz",
      ICI_to_next_s >= ici_min_s & ICI_to_next_s <= ici_max_s ~ "kept_0.01_to_0.4_s",
      ICI_to_next_s > ici_max_s ~ "above_0.4_s_long_gap",
      TRUE ~ "other"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Overall filter summary
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_filter_summary <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  count(ICI_filter_category, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  mutate(
    percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_clicks))

cat("Overall ICI filter summary:\n")
print(ici_filter_summary)

write.csv(
  ici_filter_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "ici_filter_summary_overall.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Filter summary by event
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_filter_summary_by_event <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  group_by(DriftID_spectra, EventID, ICI_filter_category) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clicks = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(DriftID_spectra, EventID) %>%
  mutate(
    percent_within_event = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(DriftID_spectra, EventID, ICI_filter_category)

cat("\nICI filter summary by event:\n")
print(ici_filter_summary_by_event)

write.csv(
  ici_filter_summary_by_event,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "ici_filter_summary_by_event.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Kept-click summary by event
# ------------------------------------------------------------

kept_summary_by_event <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  group_by(DriftID_spectra, EventID) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total_clicks = n(),
    n_kept_0.01_to_0.4_s = sum(ICI_filter_category == "kept_0.01_to_0.4_s"),
    percent_kept = 100 * n_kept_0.01_to_0.4_s / n_total_clicks,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(DriftID_spectra, EventID)

cat("\nKept-click summary by event:\n")
print(kept_summary_by_event)

write.csv(
  kept_summary_by_event,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "kept_click_summary_by_event.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

## Filter to 0.01-0.4 s and Sample Up To 200 Clicks Per Event

```{r}

set.seed(sampling_seed)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep only clicks inside target ICI range
# ------------------------------------------------------------

eligible_clicks <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  mutate(
    RowID = row_number()
  ) %>%
  filter(
    ICI_filter_category == "kept_0.01_to_0.4_s"
  )

cat("Eligible clicks after ICI filtering:", nrow(eligible_clicks), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sample up to 200 clicks per event
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_clicks <- eligible_clicks %>%
  group_by(EventID) %>%
  slice_sample(
    n = clicks_per_event,
    replace = FALSE
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Sampled clicks:", nrow(sampled_clicks), "\n")
cat("Number of events represented:", n_distinct(sampled_clicks$EventID), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build sampled spectra matrix
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_row_ids <- sampled_clicks$RowID

spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax <- spectra_matrix_minmax[
  sampled_row_ids,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

cat("Sampled spectra matrix dimensions:\n")
print(dim(spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax))

if (nrow(spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax) != nrow(sampled_clicks)) {
  stop("FAIL: Sampled spectra matrix rows do not match sampled metadata rows.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summarize sampled clicks by event
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sample_summary_by_event <- sampled_clicks %>%
  count(DriftID_spectra, EventID, name = "n_sampled_clicks") %>%
  arrange(DriftID_spectra, EventID)

cat("\nSampled clicks by event:\n")
print(sample_summary_by_event, n = Inf)

write.csv(
  sample_summary_by_event,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "sampled_clicks_by_event.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save sampled metadata and spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  sampled_clicks,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "sampled_click_metadata_ici_filtered.rds")
)

saveRDS(
  spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "sampled_minmax_spectra_matrix_19_50_khz.rds")
)

cat("\nPASS: ICI filtering and post-filter sampling complete.\n")

```

## Run PCA on Sampled Min-Max Spectra

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA on min-max normalized spectra only
#
# rows = sampled clicks
# columns = frequency bins from 19–50 kHz
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pca_spectra <- prcomp(
  spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Variance explained
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pca_variance <- pca_spectra$sdev^2
pca_variance_explained <- pca_variance / sum(pca_variance)
pca_cumulative_variance <- cumsum(pca_variance_explained)

pca_variance_table <- data.frame(
  PC = seq_along(pca_variance_explained),
  PC_label = paste0("PC", seq_along(pca_variance_explained)),
  variance_explained = pca_variance_explained,
  cumulative_variance_explained = pca_cumulative_variance
)

cat("PCA complete.\n")
cat("Number of PCs:", ncol(pca_spectra$x), "\n\n")

cat("First 10 PCs variance explained:\n")
print(head(pca_variance_table, 10))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCs needed for variance cutoffs
# ------------------------------------------------------------

n_pcs_90 <- which(pca_cumulative_variance >= 0.90)[1]
n_pcs_95 <- which(pca_cumulative_variance >= 0.95)[1]

cat("\nNumber of PCs needed for 90% variance:", n_pcs_90, "\n")
cat("Number of PCs needed for 95% variance:", n_pcs_95, "\n")
cat("Fixed PC option:", fixed_n_pcs, "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save PCA objects and variance table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  pca_spectra,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "pca_spectra_sampled_minmax_19_50_khz.rds")
)

write.csv(
  pca_variance_table,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "pca_variance_explained.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nPASS: PCA completed and saved.\n")

```

## Plot PCA Variance Explained

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Scree plot: variance explained by each PC
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_scree <- ggplot(
  pca_variance_table,
  aes(x = PC, y = variance_explained)
) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = fixed_n_pcs, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = n_pcs_90, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = n_pcs_95, linetype = "dotdash") +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Scree Plot",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Dashed = 5 PCs; dotted = 90% variance (",
      n_pcs_90,
      " PCs); dot-dash = 95% variance (",
      n_pcs_95,
      " PCs)"
    ),
    x = "Principal Component",
    y = "Proportion of variance explained"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_scree)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "pca_scree_plot.png"),
  plot = p_scree,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cumulative variance plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_cumulative <- ggplot(
  pca_variance_table,
  aes(x = PC, y = cumulative_variance_explained)
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dotdash") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = fixed_n_pcs, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = n_pcs_90, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = n_pcs_95, linetype = "dotdash") +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Cumulative Variance Explained",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "5 PCs vs. PCs needed for 90% and 95% total spectral variance"
    ),
    x = "Number of principal components",
    y = "Cumulative variance explained"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_cumulative)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "pca_cumulative_variance_plot.png"),
  plot = p_cumulative,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved PCA variance plots to:\n")
cat(plot_dir, "\n")

```

## Build PC + Scaled logICI Feature Matrices

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Add PCA scores to sampled click metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pc_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_spectra$x)

sampled_clicks_with_pcs <- bind_cols(
  sampled_clicks,
  pc_scores
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Prepare log-transformed and scaled ICI
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_clicks_with_pcs <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  mutate(
    log10_ICI_to_next_s = log10(ICI_to_next_s),
    scaled_log10_ICI = as.numeric(scale(log10_ICI_to_next_s))
  )

cat("Summary of raw ICI seconds:\n")
print(summary(sampled_clicks_with_pcs$ICI_to_next_s))

cat("\nSummary of log10 ICI seconds:\n")
print(summary(sampled_clicks_with_pcs$log10_ICI_to_next_s))

cat("\nSummary of scaled log10 ICI:\n")
print(summary(sampled_clicks_with_pcs$scaled_log10_ICI))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Define PC sets
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pc_set_5 <- paste0("PC", 1:fixed_n_pcs)
pc_set_90 <- paste0("PC", 1:n_pcs_90)
pc_set_95 <- paste0("PC", 1:n_pcs_95)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build feature matrices
# ------------------------------------------------------------

feature_matrix_5pc_ici <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_5), scaled_log10_ICI) %>%
  as.matrix()

feature_matrix_90pc_ici <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_90), scaled_log10_ICI) %>%
  as.matrix()

feature_matrix_95pc_ici <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_95), scaled_log10_ICI) %>%
  as.matrix()

feature_matrix_5pc_spectra_only <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_5)) %>%
  as.matrix()

feature_matrix_90pc_spectra_only <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_90)) %>%
  as.matrix()

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("\nFeature matrix dimensions:\n")
cat("5 PCs + ICI:", dim(feature_matrix_5pc_ici), "\n")
cat("90% PCs + ICI:", dim(feature_matrix_90pc_ici), "\n")
cat("95% PCs + ICI:", dim(feature_matrix_95pc_ici), "\n")
cat("5 PCs only:", dim(feature_matrix_5pc_spectra_only), "\n")
cat("90% PCs only:", dim(feature_matrix_90pc_spectra_only), "\n")

if (any(!is.finite(feature_matrix_5pc_ici))) {
  stop("FAIL: 5 PC + ICI matrix contains non-finite values.")
}

if (any(!is.finite(feature_matrix_90pc_ici))) {
  stop("FAIL: 90 PC + ICI matrix contains non-finite values.")
}

if (any(!is.finite(feature_matrix_95pc_ici))) {
  stop("FAIL: 95 PC + ICI matrix contains non-finite values.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save feature metadata and matrices
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  sampled_clicks_with_pcs,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "sampled_clicks_with_pcs_and_scaled_logici.rds")
)

saveRDS(
  feature_matrix_5pc_ici,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "feature_matrix_5pc_plus_scaled_logici.rds")
)

saveRDS(
  feature_matrix_90pc_ici,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "feature_matrix_90pc_plus_scaled_logici.rds")
)

saveRDS(
  feature_matrix_95pc_ici,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "feature_matrix_95pc_plus_scaled_logici.rds")
)

cat("\nPASS: PC + scaled logICI feature matrices created.\n")

```

## Run UMAP on Spectra-Only and Spectra + Scaled logICI Features Matrices

```{r}

set.seed(umap_seed)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function to run UMAP cleanly
# ------------------------------------------------------------

run_umap_analysis <- function(feature_matrix, analysis_name) {
  
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("Running UMAP:", analysis_name, "\n")
  cat("============================\n")
  
  umap_result <- uwot::umap(
    feature_matrix,
    n_neighbors = umap_neighbors,
    min_dist = umap_min_dist,
    metric = umap_metric,
    n_components = 2,
    ret_model = FALSE,
    verbose = TRUE,
    seed = umap_seed
  )
  
  umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_result)
  names(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
  
  umap_df$Analysis <- analysis_name
  
  return(umap_df)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Main UMAP runs
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_5pc_spectra_only <- run_umap_analysis(
  feature_matrix = feature_matrix_5pc_spectra_only,
  analysis_name = "5PC_spectra_only"
)

umap_5pc_ici <- run_umap_analysis(
  feature_matrix = feature_matrix_5pc_ici,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI"
)

umap_90pc_spectra_only <- run_umap_analysis(
  feature_matrix = feature_matrix_90pc_spectra_only,
  analysis_name = "90PC_spectra_only"
)

umap_90pc_ici <- run_umap_analysis(
  feature_matrix = feature_matrix_90pc_ici,
  analysis_name = "90PC_plus_scaled_logICI"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Attach UMAP coordinates to metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_results_all <- bind_rows(
  bind_cols(sampled_clicks_with_pcs, umap_5pc_spectra_only),
  bind_cols(sampled_clicks_with_pcs, umap_5pc_ici),
  bind_cols(sampled_clicks_with_pcs, umap_90pc_spectra_only),
  bind_cols(sampled_clicks_with_pcs, umap_90pc_ici)
)

cat("\nRows in combined UMAP results:", nrow(umap_results_all), "\n")
cat("Expected rows:", nrow(sampled_clicks_with_pcs) * 4, "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save UMAP outputs
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  umap_results_all,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "umap_results_all_main_comparisons.rds")
)

write.csv(
  umap_results_all,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "umap_results_all_main_comparisons.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nPASS: UMAP runs complete and saved.\n")

```

## Plot UMAPs Colored by logICI

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot helper
# ------------------------------------------------------------

plot_umap_logici <- function(df, analysis_name) {
  
  plot_data <- df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_name)
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = UMAP1,
      y = UMAP2,
      color = log10_ICI_to_next_s
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(
      size = 0.4,
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(
      option = "plasma"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("UMAP: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = "Colored by log10 ICI (seconds)",
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2",
      color = "log10 ICI"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_umap_5pc_only <- plot_umap_logici(
  umap_results_all,
  "5PC_spectra_only"
)

p_umap_5pc_ici <- plot_umap_logici(
  umap_results_all,
  "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI"
)

p_umap_90pc_only <- plot_umap_logici(
  umap_results_all,
  "90PC_spectra_only"
)

p_umap_90pc_ici <- plot_umap_logici(
  umap_results_all,
  "90PC_plus_scaled_logICI"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Print plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

print(p_umap_5pc_only)
print(p_umap_5pc_ici)
print(p_umap_90pc_only)
print(p_umap_90pc_ici)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "umap_5pc_spectra_only_logici.png"),
  p_umap_5pc_only,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "umap_5pc_plus_logici.png"),
  p_umap_5pc_ici,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "umap_90pc_spectra_only_logici.png"),
  p_umap_90pc_only,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "umap_90pc_plus_logici.png"),
  p_umap_90pc_ici,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved UMAP logICI plots to:\n")
cat(plot_dir, "\n")

```

## Add Raw-Scaled ICI Comparison UMAPS

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build raw-scaled ICI feature matrices
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_clicks_with_pcs <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  mutate(
    scaled_raw_ICI = as.numeric(scale(ICI_to_next_s))
  )

feature_matrix_5pc_rawici <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_5), scaled_raw_ICI) %>%
  as.matrix()

feature_matrix_90pc_rawici <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_90), scaled_raw_ICI) %>%
  as.matrix()

cat("Summary of scaled raw ICI:\n")
print(summary(sampled_clicks_with_pcs$scaled_raw_ICI))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run UMAPs
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_5pc_rawici <- run_umap_analysis(
  feature_matrix = feature_matrix_5pc_rawici,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_scaled_rawICI"
)

umap_90pc_rawici <- run_umap_analysis(
  feature_matrix = feature_matrix_90pc_rawici,
  analysis_name = "90PC_plus_scaled_rawICI"
)

umap_rawici_results <- bind_rows(
  bind_cols(sampled_clicks_with_pcs, umap_5pc_rawici),
  bind_cols(sampled_clicks_with_pcs, umap_90pc_rawici)
)

saveRDS(
  umap_rawici_results,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "umap_results_rawici_comparison.rds")
)

cat("\nPASS: Raw-scaled ICI UMAP comparison complete.\n")

```

## Plot Raw-ICI UMAPs

```{r}

p_umap_5pc_rawici <- plot_umap_logici(
  umap_rawici_results,
  "5PC_plus_scaled_rawICI"
)

p_umap_90pc_rawici <- plot_umap_logici(
  umap_rawici_results,
  "90PC_plus_scaled_rawICI"
)

print(p_umap_5pc_rawici)
print(p_umap_90pc_rawici)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "umap_5pc_plus_scaled_rawici_colored_logici.png"),
  p_umap_5pc_rawici,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "umap_90pc_plus_scaled_rawici_colored_logici.png"),
  p_umap_90pc_rawici,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved raw-ICI comparison UMAP plots.\n")

```

## Plot UMAPs by DriftID

```{r}

plot_umap_drift <- function(df, analysis_name) {
  
  plot_data <- df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_name)
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = UMAP1,
      y = UMAP2,
      color = DriftID_spectra
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.65) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("UMAP: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = "Colored by DriftID",
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2",
      color = "DriftID"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  return(p)
}

drift_umap_analyses <- c(
  "5PC_spectra_only",
  "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI",
  "90PC_spectra_only",
  "90PC_plus_scaled_logICI"
)

for (analysis_name in drift_umap_analyses) {
  
  p <- plot_umap_drift(umap_results_all, analysis_name)
  
  print(p)
  
  ggsave(
    file.path(
      plot_dir,
      paste0("umap_", analysis_name, "_by_drift.png")
    ),
    p,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
}

```

## Load Fixed k-means Cluster Assignments and Merge with UMAP

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Choose which existing k-means result to compare against
# ------------------------------------------------------------

kmeans_k_to_compare <- 5

cluster_base_dir <- "E:/Analysis/Clustering Output/MinMax_Normalized_ADRIFT003_Corrected/Min-Max Normalized"

cluster_file <- file.path(
  cluster_base_dir,
  paste0("kmeans k_", kmeans_k_to_compare),
  "data",
  "cluster_assignments_full.csv"
)

if (!file.exists(cluster_file)) {
  stop("Could not find k-means cluster file: ", cluster_file)
}

kmeans_assignments <- read.csv(cluster_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    UID = as.character(UID),
    kmeans_cluster = factor(cluster),
    kmeans_k = kmeans_k_to_compare
  ) %>%
  select(EventID, UID, kmeans_cluster, kmeans_k)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Check uniqueness
# ------------------------------------------------------------

kmeans_duplicate_check <- kmeans_assignments %>%
  count(EventID, UID, name = "n_rows") %>%
  filter(n_rows > 1)

if (nrow(kmeans_duplicate_check) > 0) {
  stop("K-means assignments contain duplicated EventID + UID rows.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Merge with UMAP results
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_results_with_kmeans <- umap_results_all %>%
  mutate(UID = as.character(UID)) %>%
  left_join(
    kmeans_assignments,
    by = c("EventID", "UID")
  )

cat("Rows in UMAP results:", nrow(umap_results_all), "\n")
cat("Rows after k-means merge:", nrow(umap_results_with_kmeans), "\n")
cat("Rows missing k-means cluster:", sum(is.na(umap_results_with_kmeans$kmeans_cluster)), "\n")

if (nrow(umap_results_with_kmeans) != nrow(umap_results_all)) {
  stop("K-means merge changed row count.")
}

saveRDS(
  umap_results_with_kmeans,
  file = file.path(data_dir, paste0("umap_results_with_kmeans_k", kmeans_k_to_compare, ".rds"))
)

cat("\nPASS: K-means assignments merged with UMAP results.\n")

```

## Plot UMAPs by Fixed k-means Cluster

```{r}

plot_umap_kmeans <- function(df, analysis_name) {
  
  plot_data <- df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_name)
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = UMAP1,
      y = UMAP2,
      color = kmeans_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.65) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("UMAP: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = paste0("Colored by existing fixed min-max k-means cluster, k = ", kmeans_k_to_compare),
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2",
      color = "k-means cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  return(p)
}

for (analysis_name in drift_umap_analyses) {
  
  p <- plot_umap_kmeans(umap_results_with_kmeans, analysis_name)
  
  print(p)
  
  ggsave(
    file.path(
      plot_dir,
      paste0("umap_", analysis_name, "_by_kmeans_k", kmeans_k_to_compare, ".png")
    ),
    p,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
}

```

## PCA Score Plots Colored by ICI and k-means Cluster

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Merge k-means labels into sampled PCA metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  mutate(UID = as.character(UID)) %>%
  left_join(
    kmeans_assignments,
    by = c("EventID", "UID")
  )

cat("Rows in sampled PCA metadata:", nrow(sampled_clicks_with_pcs), "\n")
cat("Rows after k-means merge:", nrow(sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans), "\n")
cat("Rows missing k-means cluster:",
    sum(is.na(sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans$kmeans_cluster)), "\n")

if (nrow(sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans) != nrow(sampled_clicks_with_pcs)) {
  stop("FAIL: k-means merge changed row count.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PC1 vs PC2 colored by logICI
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_pc12_logici <- ggplot(
  sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans,
  aes(
    x = PC1,
    y = PC2,
    color = log10_ICI_to_next_s
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.55) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Scores: PC1 vs PC2",
    subtitle = "Colored by log10 ICI (seconds)",
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    color = "log10 ICI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_pc12_logici)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "pca_pc1_pc2_colored_by_logici.png"),
  p_pc12_logici,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PC1 vs PC2 colored by existing k-means cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_pc12_kmeans <- ggplot(
  sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans,
  aes(
    x = PC1,
    y = PC2,
    color = kmeans_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Scores: PC1 vs PC2",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Colored by existing fixed min-max k-means cluster, k = ",
      kmeans_k_to_compare
    ),
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    color = "k-means cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_pc12_kmeans)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, paste0("pca_pc1_pc2_colored_by_kmeans_k", kmeans_k_to_compare, ".png")),
  p_pc12_kmeans,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PC1 vs PC3 colored by k-means cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_pc13_kmeans <- ggplot(
  sampled_clicks_pca_kmeans,
  aes(
    x = PC1,
    y = PC3,
    color = kmeans_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Scores: PC1 vs PC3",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Colored by existing fixed min-max k-means cluster, k = ",
      kmeans_k_to_compare
    ),
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC3",
    color = "k-means cluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_pc13_kmeans)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, paste0("pca_pc1_pc3_colored_by_kmeans_k", kmeans_k_to_compare, ".png")),
  p_pc13_kmeans,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: PCA diagnostic plots saved.\n")

```

## Save and Plot PCA Loading Vectors

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract PCA loadings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pca_loadings <- as.data.frame(pca_spectra$rotation)

pca_loadings <- pca_loadings %>%
  mutate(
    Frequency_kHz = freq_focus,
    FreqBin = row_number()
  ) %>%
  relocate(FreqBin, Frequency_kHz)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save full loading table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  pca_loadings,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "pca_loading_vectors_by_frequency.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  pca_loadings,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "pca_loading_vectors_by_frequency.rds")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot first 5 loading vectors
# ------------------------------------------------------------

pca_loadings_long <- pca_loadings %>%
  select(Frequency_kHz, PC1, PC2, PC3, PC4, PC5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("PC"),
    names_to = "PC",
    values_to = "Loading"
  )

p_loadings <- ggplot(
  pca_loadings_long,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = Loading
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ PC, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Loading Vectors for First 5 Principal Components",
    subtitle = "Loadings show which frequency bands contribute to each spectral PC",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Loading"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_loadings)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "pca_loading_vectors_first_5_pcs.png"),
  plot = p_loadings,
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved PCA loading vectors and loading plot.\n")

```

## Run HDBSCAN on Primary UMAP Analyses

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function: run HDBSCAN on one UMAP space
# ------------------------------------------------------------

run_hdbscan_analysis <- function(df, analysis_name, minPts = hdbscan_minPts) {
  
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("Running HDBSCAN:", analysis_name, "\n")
  cat("============================\n")
  
  umap_subset <- df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_name)
  
  umap_matrix <- umap_subset %>%
    select(UMAP1, UMAP2) %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  hdbscan_result <- dbscan::hdbscan(
    umap_matrix,
    minPts = minPts
  )
  
  output_df <- umap_subset %>%
    mutate(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(hdbscan_result$cluster),
      HDBSCAN_membership_probability = hdbscan_result$membership_prob
    )
  
  cluster_summary <- output_df %>%
    count(HDBSCAN_cluster, name = "n_clicks") %>%
    mutate(
      percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks),
      cluster_type = if_else(
        HDBSCAN_cluster == "0",
        "noise_unassigned",
        "cluster"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_clicks))
  
  cat("\nCluster summary:\n")
  print(cluster_summary)
  
  cat("\nNumber of clusters excluding noise:",
      sum(cluster_summary$HDBSCAN_cluster != "0"), "\n")
  
  cat("Percent noise:",
      cluster_summary$percent_clicks[cluster_summary$HDBSCAN_cluster == "0"], "\n")
  
  return(list(
    result_df = output_df,
    hdbscan_object = hdbscan_result,
    cluster_summary = cluster_summary
  ))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run primary HDBSCAN analyses
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_5pc_only <- run_hdbscan_analysis(
  df = umap_results_with_kmeans,
  analysis_name = "5PC_spectra_only",
  minPts = hdbscan_minPts
)

hdbscan_5pc_ici <- run_hdbscan_analysis(
  df = umap_results_with_kmeans,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI",
  minPts = hdbscan_minPts
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine HDBSCAN results
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_results_all <- bind_rows(
  hdbscan_5pc_only$result_df,
  hdbscan_5pc_ici$result_df
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save outputs
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  hdbscan_results_all,
  file = file.path(data_dir, "hdbscan_results_primary_analyses.rds")
)

write.csv(
  hdbscan_results_all,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_results_primary_analyses.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  hdbscan_5pc_only$cluster_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_summary_5pc_spectra_only.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  hdbscan_5pc_ici$cluster_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_summary_5pc_plus_logici.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nPASS: HDBSCAN completed for primary analyses.\n")

```

## Plot HDBSCAN Clusters on UMAP

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot helper
# ------------------------------------------------------------

plot_hdbscan_umap <- function(df, analysis_name) {
  
  plot_data <- df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_name)
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = UMAP1,
      y = UMAP2,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(
      size = 0.5,
      alpha = 0.65
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("HDBSCAN Clusters: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = "Cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2",
      color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_hdbscan_5pc_only <- plot_hdbscan_umap(
  hdbscan_results_all,
  "5PC_spectra_only"
)

p_hdbscan_5pc_ici <- plot_hdbscan_umap(
  hdbscan_results_all,
  "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Print plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

print(p_hdbscan_5pc_only)
print(p_hdbscan_5pc_ici)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "hdbscan_umap_5pc_spectra_only.png"),
  p_hdbscan_5pc_only,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "hdbscan_umap_5pc_plus_logici.png"),
  p_hdbscan_5pc_ici,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved HDBSCAN UMAP plots.\n")

```

## Summarize ICI by HDBSCAN Cluster

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Focus on primary joint spectral-temporal analysis
# ------------------------------------------------------------

joint_clusters <- hdbscan_results_all %>%
  filter(Analysis == "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# ICI summary by cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_summary_by_cluster <- joint_clusters %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    
    n_clicks = n(),
    
    median_ici_s = median(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    mean_ici_s = mean(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    sd_ici_s = sd(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    min_ici_s = min(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    max_ici_s = max(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    q25_ici_s = quantile(ICI_to_next_s, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    q75_ici_s = quantile(ICI_to_next_s, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    n_events = n_distinct(EventID),
    
    n_drifts = n_distinct(DriftID_spectra),
    
    .groups = "drop"
    
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_clicks))

print(ici_summary_by_cluster)

write.csv(
  ici_summary_by_cluster,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "ici_summary_by_hdbscan_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Boxplot of ICI by cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_ici_boxplot <- ggplot(
  joint_clusters,
  aes(
    x = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    y = ICI_to_next_s,
    fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    outlier.size = 0.3
  ) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "ICI Distribution by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis",
    x = "HDBSCAN cluster",
    y = "ICI (seconds, log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_ici_boxplot)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "ici_boxplot_by_hdbscan_cluster.png"),
  p_ici_boxplot,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved ICI summaries and boxplot.\n")

```

## Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Focus on joint spectral-temporal HDBSCAN result
# ------------------------------------------------------------

joint_clusters <- hdbscan_results_all %>%
  filter(Analysis == "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI") %>%
  mutate(
    RowID = as.integer(RowID),
    HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pull sampled spectra for these clustered clicks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

joint_spectra <- spectra_matrix_minmax[
  joint_clusters$RowID,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

if (nrow(joint_spectra) != nrow(joint_clusters)) {
  stop("FAIL: Joint spectra rows do not match joint cluster metadata.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Compute mean and SD spectrum by HDBSCAN cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_spectra_summary <- list()

for (cluster_id in levels(joint_clusters$HDBSCAN_cluster)) {
  
  cluster_rows <- which(joint_clusters$HDBSCAN_cluster == cluster_id)
  
  cluster_matrix <- joint_spectra[
    cluster_rows,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  
  cluster_spectra_summary[[cluster_id]] <- data.frame(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = cluster_id,
    Frequency_kHz = freq_focus,
    mean_minmax_spectrum = colMeans(cluster_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_minmax_spectrum = apply(cluster_matrix, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_clicks = length(cluster_rows)
  )
}

cluster_spectra_summary <- bind_rows(cluster_spectra_summary)

write.csv(
  cluster_spectra_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "mean_spectra_by_hdbscan_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot all cluster mean spectra together
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_cluster_mean_spectra <- ggplot(
  cluster_spectra_summary,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = mean_minmax_spectrum,
    color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    group = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Min-Max Normalized Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude",
    color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_cluster_mean_spectra)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "mean_spectra_by_hdbscan_cluster_all.png"),
  p_cluster_mean_spectra,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Faceted plot by cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_cluster_mean_spectra_faceted <- ggplot(
  cluster_spectra_summary,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = mean_minmax_spectrum
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ HDBSCAN_cluster,
    ncol = 2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Min-Max Normalized Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "Faceted by cluster; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_cluster_mean_spectra_faceted)

ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "mean_spectra_by_hdbscan_cluster_faceted.png"),
  p_cluster_mean_spectra_faceted,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved mean spectra by HDBSCAN cluster.\n")

```

## Stacked Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create vertically offset cluster mean spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

stacked_cluster_spectra <- cluster_spectra_summary %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)),
    cluster_label = paste0("Cluster ", HDBSCAN_cluster),
    offset = HDBSCAN_cluster_numeric,
    stacked_spectrum = mean_minmax_spectrum + offset
  )

# Optional: remove noise cluster 0 from main stacked figure
stacked_cluster_spectra_no_noise <- stacked_cluster_spectra %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Tall/narrow stacked plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_stacked_spectra <- ggplot(
  stacked_cluster_spectra_no_noise,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = stacked_spectrum,
    group = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    color = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(stacked_cluster_spectra_no_noise$offset)),
    labels = sort(unique(stacked_cluster_spectra_no_noise$HDBSCAN_cluster))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Stacked Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis; noise cluster removed",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10))
  )

print(p_stacked_spectra)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "stacked_mean_spectra_by_hdbscan_cluster_no_noise.png"),
  plot = p_stacked_spectra,
  width = 4,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Also save a version including noise cluster 0
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_stacked_spectra_with_noise <- ggplot(
  stacked_cluster_spectra,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = stacked_spectrum,
    group = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    color = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(stacked_cluster_spectra$offset)),
    labels = sort(unique(stacked_cluster_spectra$HDBSCAN_cluster))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Stacked Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10))
  )

print(p_stacked_spectra_with_noise)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "stacked_mean_spectra_by_hdbscan_cluster_with_noise.png"),
  plot = p_stacked_spectra_with_noise,
  width = 4,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Saved stacked mean spectra figures.\n")

```

## Concatenated Spectrograms by HDBSCAN Cluster

```{r}

set.seed(cluster_spectrogram_seed)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folder
# ------------------------------------------------------------

concat_spec_dir <- file.path(
  plot_dir,
  "concatenated_spectrograms_by_hdbscan_cluster_baseR"
)

dir.create(concat_spec_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Color palette matching previous min-max clustering workflow
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spec_cols <- colorRampPalette(
  c("white", "#FFD54F", "#FF9800", "#D84315", "#4E0012")
)(200)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Use joint spectral-temporal HDBSCAN result
# Exclude cluster 0 because it is noise/unassigned
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_ids <- joint_clusters %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  pull(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.character() %>%
  sort()

cat("Clusters to plot:\n")
print(cluster_ids)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Generate one concatenated spectrogram per HDBSCAN cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

for (cl in cluster_ids) {
  
  cluster_metadata <- joint_clusters %>%
    filter(HDBSCAN_cluster == cl)
  
  n_total_cluster <- nrow(cluster_metadata)
  
  if (n_total_cluster == 0) next
  
  # Sample up to max_clicks_per_cluster_spectrogram clicks.
  # This is NOT ordered by ICI; it is random sampled order.
  cluster_metadata_plot <- cluster_metadata %>%
    slice_sample(
      n = min(max_clicks_per_cluster_spectrogram, n_total_cluster),
      replace = FALSE
    )
  
  cluster_spec <- spectra_matrix_minmax[
    cluster_metadata_plot$RowID,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  
  median_ici <- median(cluster_metadata$ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE)
  mean_ici <- mean(cluster_metadata$ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_events <- n_distinct(cluster_metadata$EventID)
  n_drifts <- n_distinct(cluster_metadata$DriftID_spectra)
  
  out_file <- file.path(
    concat_spec_dir,
    paste0(
      "concatenated_spectrogram_hdbscan_cluster_",
      cl,
      "_5PC_plus_scaled_logICI.png"
    )
  )
  
  png(out_file, width = 1800, height = 900)
  
  image(
    x = seq_len(nrow(cluster_spec)),
    y = freq_focus,
    z = cluster_spec,
    col = spec_cols,
    xlab = "Click Number",
    ylab = "Frequency (kHz)",
    main = paste0(
      "Concatenated Click Spectrogram - HDBSCAN Cluster ",
      cl,
      "\n5PC + scaled logICI; n = ", n_total_cluster,
      "; plotted = ", nrow(cluster_metadata_plot),
      "; median ICI = ", round(median_ici, 3), " s",
      "; mean ICI = ", round(mean_ici, 3), " s",
      "; ", n_events, " events; ", n_drifts, " drifts"
    ),
    useRaster = TRUE,
    axes = FALSE
  )
  
  axis(1)
  axis(2, at = seq(20, 50, by = 10))
  box()
  
  dev.off()
  
  cat("Saved:", out_file, "\n")
}

cat("\nFinished concatenated spectrograms for HDBSCAN clusters.\n")
cat("Output folder:\n")
cat(concat_spec_dir, "\n")

```

## Check HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event and Drift

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Focus on joint spectral-temporal HDBSCAN result
# ------------------------------------------------------------

joint_clusters <- hdbscan_results_all %>%
  filter(Analysis == "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI") %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Overall cluster coverage summary
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_coverage_summary <- joint_clusters %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clicks = n(),
    percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / nrow(joint_clusters),
    n_events = n_distinct(EventID),
    n_drifts = n_distinct(DriftID_spectra),
    median_ici_s = median(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ici_s = mean(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_clicks))

cat("Cluster coverage summary:\n")
print(cluster_coverage_summary)

write.csv(
  cluster_coverage_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_cluster_coverage_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cluster composition by EventID
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_event_composition <- joint_clusters %>%
  count(HDBSCAN_cluster, EventID, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_total_clicks = sum(n_clicks),
    percent_of_cluster = 100 * n_clicks / cluster_total_clicks
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(HDBSCAN_cluster, desc(n_clicks))

cat("\nCluster composition by EventID:\n")
print(cluster_event_composition, n = 50)

write.csv(
  cluster_event_composition,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_cluster_composition_by_event.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Top contributing events per cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

top_events_per_cluster <- cluster_event_composition %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  slice_max(
    order_by = n_clicks,
    n = 5,
    with_ties = FALSE
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(HDBSCAN_cluster, desc(n_clicks))

cat("\nTop 5 contributing events per cluster:\n")
print(top_events_per_cluster, n = Inf)

write.csv(
  top_events_per_cluster,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_top_events_per_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cluster composition by DriftID
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_drift_composition <- joint_clusters %>%
  count(HDBSCAN_cluster, DriftID_spectra, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_total_clicks = sum(n_clicks),
    percent_of_cluster = 100 * n_clicks / cluster_total_clicks
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(HDBSCAN_cluster, desc(n_clicks))

cat("\nCluster composition by DriftID:\n")
print(cluster_drift_composition, n = 50)

write.csv(
  cluster_drift_composition,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_cluster_composition_by_drift.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Top contributing drifts per cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

top_drifts_per_cluster <- cluster_drift_composition %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  slice_max(
    order_by = n_clicks,
    n = 5,
    with_ties = FALSE
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(HDBSCAN_cluster, desc(n_clicks))

cat("\nTop 5 contributing drifts per cluster:\n")
print(top_drifts_per_cluster, n = Inf)

write.csv(
  top_drifts_per_cluster,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_top_drifts_per_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Flag potentially event-dominated clusters
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_dominance_summary <- cluster_event_composition %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    top_event = EventID[which.max(n_clicks)],
    top_event_clicks = max(n_clicks),
    top_event_percent = max(percent_of_cluster),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(top_event_percent))

cat("\nEvent dominance summary:\n")
print(event_dominance_summary)

write.csv(
  event_dominance_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_event_dominance_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

drift_dominance_summary <- cluster_drift_composition %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    top_drift = DriftID_spectra[which.max(n_clicks)],
    top_drift_clicks = max(n_clicks),
    top_drift_percent = max(percent_of_cluster),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(top_drift_percent))

cat("\nDrift dominance summary:\n")
print(drift_dominance_summary)

write.csv(
  drift_dominance_summary,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_drift_dominance_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Simple bar plot: top events per cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_top_events <- ggplot(
  top_events_per_cluster,
  aes(
    x = reorder(EventID, n_clicks),
    y = n_clicks,
    fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ HDBSCAN_cluster,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Contributing Events per HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis",
    x = "EventID",
    y = "Number of clicks"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )

print(p_top_events)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "top_events_per_hdbscan_cluster.png"),
  plot = p_top_events,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Simple bar plot: top drifts per cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_top_drifts <- ggplot(
  top_drifts_per_cluster,
  aes(
    x = reorder(DriftID_spectra, n_clicks),
    y = n_clicks,
    fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ HDBSCAN_cluster,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Contributing Drifts per HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis",
    x = "DriftID",
    y = "Number of clicks"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )

print(p_top_drifts)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "top_drifts_per_hdbscan_cluster.png"),
  plot = p_top_drifts,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nPASS: Cluster composition diagnostics completed and saved.\n")

```

## Mean Spectra with Variability Ribbons for All Non-Noise Clusters

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Use non-noise HDBSCAN clusters from joint analysis
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_spectra_ribbon_data <- cluster_spectra_summary %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  mutate(
    lower_sd = pmax(mean_minmax_spectrum - sd_minmax_spectrum, 0),
    upper_sd = pmin(mean_minmax_spectrum + sd_minmax_spectrum, 1)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Faceted mean ± SD ribbons
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_cluster_spectra_ribbons <- ggplot(
  cluster_spectra_ribbon_data,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = mean_minmax_spectrum
  )
) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = lower_sd,
      ymax = upper_sd
    ),
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ HDBSCAN_cluster,
    ncol = 2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Spectra with Variability by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "Mean ± 1 SD; 5PC + scaled logICI analysis; noise cluster excluded",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Min-max normalized amplitude"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_cluster_spectra_ribbons)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "mean_spectra_with_sd_ribbons_hdbscan_clusters_1_to_6.png"),
  plot = p_cluster_spectra_ribbons,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save ribbon data
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  cluster_spectra_ribbon_data,
  file = file.path(table_dir, "mean_spectra_with_sd_ribbons_hdbscan_clusters_1_to_6.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("Saved mean spectra with SD ribbons for all non-noise clusters.\n")

```

----------------------------------------------

## Full Dataset Assignment

## Force-Assign All Eligible Clicks to Nearest HDBSCAN cluster

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folder for full-dataset assignment
# ------------------------------------------------------------

full_assignment_dir <- file.path(
  "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN",
  "Full_Eligible_Click_Assignment_1x_scaled_logICI"
)

full_assignment_dirs <- make_output_folders(full_assignment_dir)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Recreate full eligible click table
# These are all clicks with ICI between 0.01 and 0.4 s
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_eligible_clicks <- spectra_metadata_with_ici %>%
  mutate(
    RowID = row_number()
  ) %>%
  filter(
    ICI_filter_category == "kept_0.01_to_0.4_s"
  )

cat("All eligible clicks:", nrow(all_eligible_clicks), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pull min-max spectra for all eligible clicks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_eligible_spectra_minmax <- spectra_matrix_minmax[
  all_eligible_clicks$RowID,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

cat("All eligible spectra matrix dimensions:\n")
print(dim(all_eligible_spectra_minmax))

if (nrow(all_eligible_spectra_minmax) != nrow(all_eligible_clicks)) {
  stop("FAIL: Eligible spectra rows do not match eligible metadata rows.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Project all eligible clicks into the existing PCA space
# IMPORTANT: This uses the PCA fit from the sampled dataset.
# It does NOT refit PCA.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_eligible_pc_scores <- predict(
  pca_spectra,
  newdata = all_eligible_spectra_minmax
)

all_eligible_pc_scores <- as.data.frame(all_eligible_pc_scores)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Scale logICI using the SAME mean and SD from the sampled analysis
# IMPORTANT: Do not rescale using the full dataset.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_logici_mean <- mean(sampled_clicks_with_pcs$log10_ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE)
sampled_logici_sd <- sd(sampled_clicks_with_pcs$log10_ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE)

all_eligible_with_pcs <- bind_cols(
  all_eligible_clicks,
  all_eligible_pc_scores
) %>%
  mutate(
    log10_ICI_to_next_s = log10(ICI_to_next_s),
    scaled_log10_ICI = as.numeric(
      (log10_ICI_to_next_s - sampled_logici_mean) / sampled_logici_sd
    )
  )

cat("\nSummary of scaled logICI for all eligible clicks:\n")
print(summary(all_eligible_with_pcs$scaled_log10_ICI))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build full feature matrix: 5 PCs + scaled logICI
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_eligible_feature_matrix <- all_eligible_with_pcs %>%
  select(all_of(pc_set_5), scaled_log10_ICI) %>%
  as.matrix()

if (any(!is.finite(all_eligible_feature_matrix))) {
  stop("FAIL: Full eligible feature matrix contains non-finite values.")
}

cat("\nFull eligible feature matrix dimensions:\n")
print(dim(all_eligible_feature_matrix))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build cluster centroids from original sampled HDBSCAN labels
# Use only non-noise clusters 1–6
# Centroids are computed in 5PC + scaled logICI feature space.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_joint_clusters <- hdbscan_results_all %>%
  filter(Analysis == "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI") %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster_original = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

non_noise_sampled <- sampled_joint_clusters %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster_original != "0")

cluster_centroids <- non_noise_sampled %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster_original) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(c(pc_set_5, "scaled_log10_ICI")),
      mean,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    n_sampled_cluster_clicks = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster_original))

print(cluster_centroids)

write.csv(
  cluster_centroids,
  file = file.path(
    full_assignment_dirs$tables,
```
