```{r}
    "hdbscan_cluster_centroids_5pc_scaled_logici.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

centroid_matrix <- cluster_centroids %>%
  select(all_of(c(pc_set_5, "scaled_log10_ICI"))) %>%
  as.matrix()

centroid_labels <- cluster_centroids$HDBSCAN_cluster_original

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Assign each eligible click to nearest non-noise centroid
# ------------------------------------------------------------

distance_to_centroids <- sapply(
  seq_len(nrow(centroid_matrix)),
  function(j) {
    rowSums(
      sweep(
        all_eligible_feature_matrix,
        2,
        centroid_matrix[j, ],
        FUN = "-"
      )^2
    )
  }
)

nearest_centroid_index <- max.col(
  -distance_to_centroids,
  ties.method = "first"
)

nearest_centroid_distance <- sqrt(
  distance_to_centroids[
    cbind(seq_len(nrow(distance_to_centroids)), nearest_centroid_index)
  ]
)

all_eligible_assigned <- all_eligible_with_pcs %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster_forced = factor(
      centroid_labels[nearest_centroid_index],
      levels = centroid_labels
    ),
    distance_to_forced_cluster_centroid = nearest_centroid_distance
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Add original HDBSCAN label for sampled clicks only
# For unsampled eligible clicks, this will be NA.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_original_labels <- sampled_joint_clusters %>%
  select(
    EventID,
    UID,
    HDBSCAN_cluster_original = HDBSCAN_cluster
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    UID = as.character(UID),
    HDBSCAN_cluster_original = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster_original)
  )

all_eligible_assigned <- all_eligible_assigned %>%
  mutate(UID = as.character(UID)) %>%
  left_join(
    sampled_original_labels,
    by = c("EventID", "UID")
  )

cat("\nRows after adding sampled original labels:", nrow(all_eligible_assigned), "\n")
cat("Sampled clicks with original HDBSCAN labels:",
    sum(!is.na(all_eligible_assigned$HDBSCAN_cluster_original)), "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save assigned full eligible dataset
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  all_eligible_assigned,
  file = file.path(
    full_assignment_dirs$data,
    "all_eligible_clicks_forced_hdbscan_assignment_1x.rds"
  )
)

write.csv(
  all_eligible_assigned,
  file = file.path(
    full_assignment_dirs$tables,
    "all_eligible_clicks_forced_hdbscan_assignment_1x.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summarize forced assignments
# ------------------------------------------------------------

forced_assignment_summary <- all_eligible_assigned %>%
  count(HDBSCAN_cluster_forced, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  mutate(
    percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_clicks))

cat("\nForced assignment summary for all eligible clicks:\n")
print(forced_assignment_summary)

write.csv(
  forced_assignment_summary,
  file = file.path(
    full_assignment_dirs$tables,
    "forced_assignment_summary_all_eligible_clicks.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nPASS: All eligible clicks assigned to nearest non-noise HDBSCAN cluster.\n")

```



































-------------------------------------------------------

#Sensitivy of ICI

## Set Up Sensitivity Output Folders

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sensitivity analysis output folders
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sensitivity_base_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN"

main_1x_dir <- file.path(sensitivity_base_dir, "Main_1x_scaled_logICI")
weight_05_dir <- file.path(sensitivity_base_dir, "Reduced_0.5x_scaled_logICI")
weight_025_dir <- file.path(sensitivity_base_dir, "Reduced_0.25x_scaled_logICI")

make_output_folders <- function(base_dir) {
  
  dir.create(base_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  subdirs <- list(
    plots = file.path(base_dir, "plots"),
    data = file.path(base_dir, "data"),
    tables = file.path(base_dir, "tables")
  )
  
  dir.create(subdirs$plots, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  dir.create(subdirs$data, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  dir.create(subdirs$tables, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  return(subdirs)
}

main_1x_dirs <- make_output_folders(main_1x_dir)
weight_05_dirs <- make_output_folders(weight_05_dir)
weight_025_dirs <- make_output_folders(weight_025_dir)

cat("Created sensitivity output folders:\n")
cat(main_1x_dir, "\n")
cat(weight_05_dir, "\n")
cat(weight_025_dir, "\n")

```

## Run Reduced ICI Weight Sensitivity Analysis

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function for one weighted ICI sensitivity run
# ------------------------------------------------------------

run_weighted_ici_sensitivity <- function(
    ici_weight,
    analysis_name,
    output_dirs
) {
  
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("Running sensitivity analysis:", analysis_name, "\n")
  cat("ICI weight:", ici_weight, "\n")
  cat("============================\n")
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Build weighted feature matrix
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  feature_matrix_weighted <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
    mutate(
      weighted_scaled_log10_ICI = ici_weight * scaled_log10_ICI
    ) %>%
    select(all_of(pc_set_5), weighted_scaled_log10_ICI) %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  cat("Feature matrix dimensions:\n")
  print(dim(feature_matrix_weighted))
  
  if (any(!is.finite(feature_matrix_weighted))) {
    stop("Weighted feature matrix contains non-finite values.")
  }
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Run UMAP
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  umap_weighted <- run_umap_analysis(
    feature_matrix = feature_matrix_weighted,
    analysis_name = analysis_name
  )
  
  umap_weighted_df <- bind_cols(
    sampled_clicks_with_pcs,
    umap_weighted
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      ICI_weight = ici_weight
    )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Run HDBSCAN
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  hdbscan_result <- dbscan::hdbscan(
    umap_weighted_df %>%
      select(UMAP1, UMAP2) %>%
      as.matrix(),
    minPts = hdbscan_minPts
  )
  
  hdbscan_weighted_df <- umap_weighted_df %>%
    mutate(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(hdbscan_result$cluster),
      HDBSCAN_membership_probability = hdbscan_result$membership_prob
    )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Cluster summary
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  cluster_summary <- hdbscan_weighted_df %>%
    count(HDBSCAN_cluster, name = "n_clicks") %>%
    mutate(
      percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks),
      cluster_type = if_else(
        HDBSCAN_cluster == "0",
        "noise_unassigned",
        "cluster"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_clicks))
  
  print(cluster_summary)
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # ICI summary by cluster
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  ici_summary <- hdbscan_weighted_df %>%
    group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
    summarise(
      n_clicks = n(),
      percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / nrow(hdbscan_weighted_df),
      median_ici_s = median(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_ici_s = mean(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25_ici_s = quantile(ICI_to_next_s, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75_ici_s = quantile(ICI_to_next_s, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_events = n_distinct(EventID),
      n_drifts = n_distinct(DriftID_spectra),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_clicks))
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Save data/tables
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  saveRDS(
    feature_matrix_weighted,
    file = file.path(output_dirs$data, paste0("feature_matrix_", analysis_name, ".rds"))
  )
  
  saveRDS(
    umap_weighted_df,
    file = file.path(output_dirs$data, paste0("umap_results_", analysis_name, ".rds"))
  )
  
  saveRDS(
    hdbscan_weighted_df,
    file = file.path(output_dirs$data, paste0("hdbscan_results_", analysis_name, ".rds"))
  )
  
  write.csv(
    cluster_summary,
    file = file.path(output_dirs$tables, paste0("hdbscan_cluster_summary_", analysis_name, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    ici_summary,
    file = file.path(output_dirs$tables, paste0("ici_summary_by_hdbscan_cluster_", analysis_name, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot UMAP colored by logICI
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  p_logici <- ggplot(
    hdbscan_weighted_df,
    aes(
      x = UMAP1,
      y = UMAP2,
      color = log10_ICI_to_next_s
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.55) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("UMAP: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = paste0("5 PCs + ", ici_weight, " × scaled log10 ICI; colored by log10 ICI"),
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2",
      color = "log10 ICI"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  print(p_logici)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dirs$plots, paste0("umap_", analysis_name, "_colored_by_logici.png")),
    plot = p_logici,
    width = 7,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot UMAP colored by HDBSCAN cluster
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  p_hdbscan <- ggplot(
    hdbscan_weighted_df,
    aes(
      x = UMAP1,
      y = UMAP2,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.65) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("HDBSCAN Clusters: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = paste0("5 PCs + ", ici_weight, " × scaled log10 ICI; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned"),
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2",
      color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  print(p_hdbscan)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dirs$plots, paste0("hdbscan_umap_", analysis_name, ".png")),
    plot = p_hdbscan,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  # ICI boxplot by HDBSCAN cluster
  # ----------------------------------------------------------
  
  p_ici_boxplot <- ggplot(
    hdbscan_weighted_df,
    aes(
      x = HDBSCAN_cluster,
      y = ICI_to_next_s,
      fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3) +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("ICI Distribution by HDBSCAN Cluster: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = paste0("5 PCs + ", ici_weight, " × scaled log10 ICI"),
      x = "HDBSCAN cluster",
      y = "ICI (seconds, log scale)"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  print(p_ici_boxplot)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dirs$plots, paste0("ici_boxplot_by_hdbscan_cluster_", analysis_name, ".png")),
    plot = p_ici_boxplot,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(list(
    feature_matrix = feature_matrix_weighted,
    umap_df = umap_weighted_df,
    hdbscan_df = hdbscan_weighted_df,
    hdbscan_object = hdbscan_result,
    cluster_summary = cluster_summary,
    ici_summary = ici_summary
  ))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run reduced-weight sensitivity analyses
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sensitivity_05x <- run_weighted_ici_sensitivity(
  ici_weight = 0.5,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_0.5x_scaled_logICI",
  output_dirs = weight_05_dirs
)

sensitivity_025x <- run_weighted_ici_sensitivity(
  ici_weight = 0.25,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_0.25x_scaled_logICI",
  output_dirs = weight_025_dirs
)

cat("\nPASS: Reduced ICI weight sensitivity analyses complete.\n")

```

## Mean Spectra for Reduced ICI-Weight Clusters

```{r}

make_weighted_cluster_spectra <- function(
    sensitivity_result,
    analysis_name,
    output_dirs
) {
  
  hdbscan_df <- sensitivity_result$hdbscan_df %>%
    mutate(
      RowID = as.integer(RowID),
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(HDBSCAN_cluster)
    )
  
  spectra_for_clusters <- spectra_matrix_minmax[
    hdbscan_df$RowID,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  
  cluster_ids <- levels(hdbscan_df$HDBSCAN_cluster)
  
  spectra_summary <- list()
  
  for (cl in cluster_ids) {
    
    cluster_rows <- which(hdbscan_df$HDBSCAN_cluster == cl)
    
    cluster_matrix <- spectra_for_clusters[
      cluster_rows,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    
    spectra_summary[[cl]] <- data.frame(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = cl,
      Frequency_kHz = freq_focus,
      mean_minmax_spectrum = colMeans(cluster_matrix, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_minmax_spectrum = apply(cluster_matrix, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_clicks = length(cluster_rows)
    )
  }
  
  spectra_summary <- bind_rows(spectra_summary) %>%
    mutate(
      lower_sd = pmax(mean_minmax_spectrum - sd_minmax_spectrum, 0),
      upper_sd = pmin(mean_minmax_spectrum + sd_minmax_spectrum, 1)
    )
  
  write.csv(
    spectra_summary,
    file = file.path(
      output_dirs$tables,
      paste0("mean_spectra_by_hdbscan_cluster_", analysis_name, ".csv")
    ),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Overlay plot
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  
  p_overlay <- ggplot(
    spectra_summary,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = mean_minmax_spectrum,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
      group = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = "Cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
      x = "Frequency (kHz)",
      y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude",
      color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  print(p_overlay)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      output_dirs$plots,
      paste0("mean_spectra_overlay_", analysis_name, ".png")
    ),
    plot = p_overlay,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Faceted mean ± SD plot
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  
  p_ribbons <- ggplot(
    spectra_summary,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = mean_minmax_spectrum
    )
  ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      aes(
        ymin = lower_sd,
        ymax = upper_sd
      ),
      alpha = 0.25
    ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    facet_wrap(
      ~ HDBSCAN_cluster,
      ncol = 2
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Mean Spectra with Variability: ", analysis_name),
      subtitle = "Mean ± 1 SD; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
      x = "Frequency (kHz)",
      y = "Min-max normalized amplitude"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  print(p_ribbons)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      output_dirs$plots,
      paste0("mean_spectra_with_sd_ribbons_", analysis_name, ".png")
    ),
    plot = p_ribbons,
    width = 10,
    height = 8,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(spectra_summary)
}

spectra_summary_05x <- make_weighted_cluster_spectra(
  sensitivity_result = sensitivity_05x,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_0.5x_scaled_logICI",
  output_dirs = weight_05_dirs
)

spectra_summary_025x <- make_weighted_cluster_spectra(
  sensitivity_result = sensitivity_025x,
  analysis_name = "5PC_plus_0.25x_scaled_logICI",
  output_dirs = weight_025_dirs
)

cat("Saved spectra plots for reduced ICI-weight clusters.\n")

```

-------------------------------------------------------

## Reload Existing PCA/UMAP/HDBSCAN Objects

```{r}

## Reload Existing PCA/ICI/UMAP/HDBSCAN Outputs

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(dbscan)

output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN"

# Find all RDS files under the workflow folder
all_rds_files <- list.files(
  output_dir,
  pattern = "\\.rds$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("RDS files found:\n")
print(all_rds_files)

find_rds <- function(pattern) {
  matches <- all_rds_files[str_detect(basename(all_rds_files), pattern)]
  
  if (length(matches) == 0) {
    stop("No RDS file found matching: ", pattern)
  }
  
  if (length(matches) > 1) {
    cat("Multiple matches found for:", pattern, "\n")
    print(matches)
    cat("Using first match:\n", matches[1], "\n")
  }
  
  matches[1]
}

sampled_clicks_with_pcs <- readRDS(
  find_rds("sampled_clicks_with_pcs_and_scaled_logici")
)

umap_results_all <- readRDS(
  find_rds("umap_results_all_main_comparisons")
)

hdbscan_results_all <- readRDS(
  find_rds("hdbscan_results_primary_analyses")
)

spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax <- readRDS(
  find_rds("sampled_minmax_spectra_matrix_19_50_khz")
)

pca_spectra <- readRDS(
  find_rds("pca_spectra_sampled_minmax_19_50_khz")
)

pca_loadings <- readRDS(
  find_rds("pca_loading_vectors_by_frequency")
)

freq_focus <- pca_loadings$Frequency_kHz

#Sanity check

cat("\nReload check:\n")
cat("sampled_clicks_with_pcs rows:", nrow(sampled_clicks_with_pcs), "\n")
cat("umap_results_all rows:", nrow(umap_results_all), "\n")
cat("hdbscan_results_all rows:", nrow(hdbscan_results_all), "\n")
cat("spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax dim:", dim(spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax), "\n")
cat("freq_focus length:", length(freq_focus), "\n")

cat("\nUMAP analyses available:\n")
print(unique(umap_results_all$Analysis))

cat("\nHDBSCAN analyses available:\n")
print(unique(hdbscan_results_all$Analysis))

```

------------------------------------------------------

## HDBSCAN Tuning

## HDBSCAN Tuning Output Folder

```{r}

tuning_dir <- file.path(
  output_dir,
  "HDBSCAN_Tuning_Safe"
)

tuning_plot_dir <- file.path(
  tuning_dir,
  "plots"
)

tuning_table_dir <- file.path(
  tuning_dir,
  "tables"
)

tuning_data_dir <- file.path(
  tuning_dir,
  "data"
)

dir.create(tuning_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(tuning_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(tuning_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(tuning_data_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

cat("Created safe tuning folder:\n")
cat(tuning_dir)

```

## HDBSCAN Tuning — 5PC + scaled logICI

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# minPts values to test
# ------------------------------------------------------------

minPts_values <- c(10, 30, 50)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pull only the primary joint spectral-temporal analysis
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_5pc_logici <- umap_results_all %>%
  filter(Analysis == "5PC_plus_scaled_logICI")

cat("Rows in 5PC + scaled logICI UMAP:\n")
print(nrow(umap_5pc_logici))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract UMAP coordinates
# ------------------------------------------------------------

umap_matrix <- umap_5pc_logici %>%
  select(UMAP1, UMAP2) %>%
  as.matrix()

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run HDBSCAN for each minPts value
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_tuning_results <- list()

for (m in minPts_values) {
  
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("Running HDBSCAN with minPts =", m, "\n")
  cat("============================\n")
  
  hdb <- dbscan::hdbscan(
    umap_matrix,
    minPts = m
  )
  
  result_df <- umap_5pc_logici %>%
    mutate(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(hdb$cluster),
      HDBSCAN_membership_probability = hdb$membership_prob,
      minPts = m
    )
  
  cluster_summary <- result_df %>%
    count(HDBSCAN_cluster, name = "n_clicks") %>%
    mutate(
      percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks),
      cluster_type = if_else(
        HDBSCAN_cluster == "0",
        "noise_unassigned",
        "cluster"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_clicks))
  
  cat("\nCluster summary:\n")
  print(cluster_summary)
  
  hdbscan_tuning_results[[paste0("minPts_", m)]] <- result_df
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # Save summary table
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  
  write.csv(
    cluster_summary,
    file.path(
      tuning_table_dir,
      paste0("hdbscan_summary_minPts_", m, ".csv")
    ),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}

cat("\nPASS: HDBSCAN tuning runs complete.\n")

```

## Compare HDBSCAN UMAP Clusters Across minPts

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine tuning outputs into one dataframe
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_tuning_combined <- bind_rows(hdbscan_tuning_results)

cat("Rows in combined tuning dataframe:\n")
print(nrow(hdbscan_tuning_combined))

cat("\nminPts values present:\n")
print(unique(hdbscan_tuning_combined$minPts))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_hdbscan_tuning_compare <- ggplot(
  hdbscan_tuning_combined,
  aes(
    x = UMAP1,
    y = UMAP2,
    color = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_point(
    size = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ minPts,
    nrow = 1
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HDBSCAN Cluster Comparison Across minPts Values",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_hdbscan_tuning_compare)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    tuning_plot_dir,
    "hdbscan_umap_compare_minPts_10_30_50.png"
  ),
  plot = p_hdbscan_tuning_compare,
  width = 18,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nSaved HDBSCAN comparison plot.\n")

```

## Clean Comparison — minPts 30 vs 50

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Prepare plotting data
# ------------------------------------------------------------

plot_30_50 <- hdbscan_tuning_combined %>%
  filter(minPts %in% c(30, 50)) %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_30_50_compare <- ggplot(
  plot_30_50,
  aes(
    x = UMAP1,
    y = UMAP2,
    color = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_point(
    size = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.75
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ minPts,
    nrow = 1
  ) +
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # Manual colors preserving cluster labels
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      
      # shared
      "0" = "grey80",
      
      # minPts = 30 major clusters
      "4" = "#17A8E3",  # blue/right
      "5" = "#8E63CE",  # purple/upper
      "6" = "#F15BB5",  # pink/lower
      
      # minPts = 30 minor clusters
      "1" = "#C49A00",
      "2" = "#4CAF50",
      "3" = "#2EC4B6",
      
      # minPts = 50 major clusters
      "2" = "#17A8E3",  # blue/right
      "3" = "#8E63CE",  # purple/upper
      "4" = "#F15BB5",  # pink/lower
      
      # minPts = 50 minor
      "1" = "#2EC4B6"
    )
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "HDBSCAN Cluster Stability Across Density Thresholds",
    subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI analysis",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_30_50_compare)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    tuning_plot_dir,
    "hdbscan_compare_minPts30_vs_50_clusterIDs.png"
  ),
  plot = p_30_50_compare,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

```

## Compare ICI Distributions — minPts 30 vs 50

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build stable region labels
# ------------------------------------------------------------

plot_30_50 <- hdbscan_tuning_combined %>%
  filter(minPts %in% c(30, 50)) %>%
  mutate(
    
    PlotCluster = case_when(
      
      # minPts = 30
      minPts == 30 & HDBSCAN_cluster == "5" ~ "Upper region",
      minPts == 30 & HDBSCAN_cluster == "4" ~ "Right region",
      minPts == 30 & HDBSCAN_cluster == "6" ~ "Lower region",
      
      # minPts = 50
      minPts == 50 & HDBSCAN_cluster == "3" ~ "Upper region",
      minPts == 50 & HDBSCAN_cluster == "2" ~ "Right region",
      minPts == 50 & HDBSCAN_cluster == "4" ~ "Lower region",
      
      # noise
      HDBSCAN_cluster == "0" ~ "Noise / unassigned",
      
      # everything else
      TRUE ~ "Minor clusters"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep only major stable regions
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ici_compare_df <- plot_30_50 %>%
  filter(
    PlotCluster %in% c(
      "Upper region",
      "Right region",
      "Lower region"
    )
  )

cat("Rows in ICI comparison dataframe:\n")
print(nrow(ici_compare_df))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_ici_compare <- ggplot(
  ici_compare_df,
  aes(
    x = PlotCluster,
    y = ICI_to_next_s,
    fill = PlotCluster
  )
) +
  
  geom_boxplot(
    outlier.size = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(
    ~ minPts,
    nrow = 1
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Upper region" = "#8E63CE",
      "Right region" = "#17A8E3",
      "Lower region" = "#F15BB5"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_log10() +
  
  labs(
    title = "ICI Distributions Across HDBSCAN Density Thresholds",
    subtitle = "Major spectral-temporal regions remain temporally distinct",
    x = NULL,
    y = "ICI (seconds, log scale)",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_ici_compare)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    tuning_plot_dir,
    "ici_boxplot_compare_minPts30_vs_50.png"
  ),
  plot = p_ici_compare,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

```

## Compare Mean Spectra — minPts 30 vs 50

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep non-noise clusters only
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_compare_clusters <- hdbscan_tuning_combined %>%
  filter(
    minPts %in% c(30, 50),
    HDBSCAN_cluster != "0"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Match spectra rows
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_matrix_compare <- spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax[
  match(
    spectra_compare_clusters$UID,
    sampled_clicks_with_pcs$UID
  ),
]

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Convert spectra to long format
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spectra_long_compare <- as.data.frame(
  spectra_matrix_compare
)

colnames(spectra_long_compare) <- paste0(
  "Freq_",
  seq_len(ncol(spectra_long_compare))
)

spectra_long_compare$UID <- spectra_compare_clusters$UID
spectra_long_compare$HDBSCAN_cluster <- spectra_compare_clusters$HDBSCAN_cluster
spectra_long_compare$minPts <- spectra_compare_clusters$minPts

spectra_long_compare <- spectra_long_compare %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Freq_"),
    names_to = "FreqIndex",
    values_to = "Amplitude"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    FreqIndex = as.numeric(
      gsub("Freq_", "", FreqIndex)
    ),
    Frequency_kHz = freq_focus[FreqIndex] / 1000
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Mean spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

mean_spectra_compare <- spectra_long_compare %>%
  group_by(
    minPts,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    Frequency_kHz
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    MeanAmplitude = mean(
      Amplitude,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    SDAmplitude = sd(
      Amplitude,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_spectra_cluster_compare <- ggplot(
  mean_spectra_compare,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = MeanAmplitude
  )
) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = MeanAmplitude - SDAmplitude,
      ymax = MeanAmplitude + SDAmplitude
    ),
    fill = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  
  geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  facet_grid(
    minPts ~ HDBSCAN_cluster
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mean Spectra with Variability by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "Comparison across minPts = 30 and 50",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Min-max normalized amplitude"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_spectra_cluster_compare)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    tuning_plot_dir,
    "mean_spectra_compare_clusters_minPts30_vs_50.png"
  ),
  plot = p_spectra_cluster_compare,
  width = 16,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

```

------------------------------------------------------
# minPts = 50 Outputs

## Export Main HDBSCAN Result — minPts = 50

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folders for selected minPts = 50 result
# ------------------------------------------------------------

minpts50_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "Main_minPts50_5PC_scaled_logICI")
minpts50_data_dir <- file.path(minpts50_dir, "data")
minpts50_table_dir <- file.path(minpts50_dir, "tables")
minpts50_plot_dir <- file.path(minpts50_dir, "plots")

dir.create(minpts50_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(minpts50_data_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(minpts50_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(minpts50_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pull minPts = 50 cluster assignments
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_minpts50_assignments <- hdbscan_tuning_combined %>%
  filter(minPts == 50) %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type = if_else(
      HDBSCAN_cluster == "0",
      "noise_unassigned",
      "cluster"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    EventID,
    DriftID_spectra,
    UID,
    RowID,
    UMAP1,
    UMAP2,
    minPts,
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type,
    HDBSCAN_membership_probability,
    ICI_to_next_s,
    log10_ICI_to_next_s,
    scaled_log10_ICI,
    starts_with("PC")
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Rows in minPts = 50 assignment table:\n")
print(nrow(hdbscan_minpts50_assignments))

cat("\nUnique clusters:\n")
print(sort(unique(hdbscan_minpts50_assignments$HDBSCAN_cluster)))

cat("\nCluster counts:\n")
print(table(hdbscan_minpts50_assignments$HDBSCAN_cluster))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save assignment table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
  hdbscan_minpts50_assignments,
  file.path(minpts50_data_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_click_assignments.rds")
)

write.csv(
  hdbscan_minpts50_assignments,
  file.path(minpts50_table_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_click_assignments.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nSaved minPts = 50 click-level assignments to:\n")
cat(minpts50_dir, "\n")

```

## Cluster Size and ICI Summary — minPts = 50

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Cluster size / percent summary
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_minpts50_cluster_summary <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  count(
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type,
    name = "n_clicks"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    percent_clicks = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type,
    desc(n_clicks)
  )

print(hdbscan_minpts50_cluster_summary)

write.csv(
  hdbscan_minpts50_cluster_summary,
  file.path(minpts50_table_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_cluster_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# ICI summary by cluster
# ------------------------------------------------------------

hdbscan_minpts50_ici_summary <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  group_by(
    HDBSCAN_cluster,
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clicks = n(),
    median_ici_s = median(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ici_s = mean(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_ici_s = sd(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25_ici_s = quantile(ICI_to_next_s, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75_ici_s = quantile(ICI_to_next_s, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_ici_s = min(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_ici_s = max(ICI_to_next_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_events = n_distinct(EventID),
    n_drifts = n_distinct(DriftID_spectra),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type,
    desc(n_clicks)
  )

print(hdbscan_minpts50_ici_summary)

write.csv(
  hdbscan_minpts50_ici_summary,
  file.path(minpts50_table_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_ici_summary_by_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nSaved cluster and ICI summary tables.\n")

```

## Generate Main minPts = 50 Tables and Plots

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Frequency grid safety
# ------------------------------------------------------------

freq_plot_khz <- if (max(freq_focus, na.rm = TRUE) > 1000) {
  freq_focus / 1000
} else {
  freq_focus
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Colors for minPts = 50 clusters
# 0 = noise/unassigned
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_colors_50 <- c(
  "0" = "#F8766D",
  "1" = "#C49A00",
  "2" = "#53B400",
  "3" = "#00C1A2",
  "4" = "#00A9E0"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build long spectra table for minPts = 50 assignments
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sampled_key <- sampled_clicks_with_pcs %>%
  mutate(
    spectrum_row = row_number(),
    UID = as.character(UID)
  ) %>%
  select(EventID, UID, spectrum_row)

assignments_with_spectrum_row <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  mutate(UID = as.character(UID)) %>%
  left_join(sampled_key, by = c("EventID", "UID"))

if (any(is.na(assignments_with_spectrum_row$spectrum_row))) {
  stop("Some minPts = 50 assignments could not be matched to spectra rows.")
}

spectra_minpts50_matrix <- spectra_matrix_sampled_minmax[
  assignments_with_spectrum_row$spectrum_row,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

spectra_minpts50_long <- as.data.frame(spectra_minpts50_matrix)

colnames(spectra_minpts50_long) <- paste0("Freq_", seq_len(ncol(spectra_minpts50_long)))

spectra_minpts50_long <- spectra_minpts50_long %>%
  mutate(
    EventID = assignments_with_spectrum_row$EventID,
    DriftID_spectra = assignments_with_spectrum_row$DriftID_spectra,
    UID = assignments_with_spectrum_row$UID,
    HDBSCAN_cluster = assignments_with_spectrum_row$HDBSCAN_cluster,
    HDBSCAN_cluster_type = assignments_with_spectrum_row$HDBSCAN_cluster_type
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Freq_"),
    names_to = "FreqIndex",
    values_to = "Amplitude"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    FreqIndex = as.integer(gsub("Freq_", "", FreqIndex)),
    Frequency_kHz = freq_plot_khz[FreqIndex]
  )

mean_spectra_minpts50 <- spectra_minpts50_long %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster, HDBSCAN_cluster_type, Frequency_kHz) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_minmax_spectrum = mean(Amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_minmax_spectrum = sd(Amplitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_clicks = n_distinct(paste(EventID, UID)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  mean_spectra_minpts50,
  file.path(minpts50_table_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_mean_spectra_by_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. UMAP cluster plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_umap_minpts50 <- ggplot(
  hdbscan_minpts50_assignments,
  aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = HDBSCAN_cluster)
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.65) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors_50) +
  labs(
    title = "HDBSCAN Clusters: 5PC + 1x scaled logICI",
    subtitle = "minPts = 50; Cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_umap_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_umap_clusters.png"),
  p_umap_minpts50,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. ICI boxplot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_ici_minpts50 <- ggplot(
  hdbscan_minpts50_assignments,
  aes(x = HDBSCAN_cluster, y = ICI_to_next_s, fill = HDBSCAN_cluster)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_50) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "ICI Distribution by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
    x = "HDBSCAN cluster",
    y = "ICI (seconds, log scale)",
    fill = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_ici_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_ici_boxplot_by_cluster.png"),
  p_ici_minpts50,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Mean spectra, all clusters together
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_mean_spectra_all_minpts50 <- ggplot(
  mean_spectra_minpts50,
  aes(
    x = Frequency_kHz,
    y = mean_minmax_spectrum,
    color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    group = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors_50) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Min-Max Normalized Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude",
    color = "HDBSCAN\ncluster"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_mean_spectra_all_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_mean_spectra_all_clusters.png"),
  p_mean_spectra_all_minpts50,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Mean spectra faceted
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_mean_spectra_faceted_minpts50 <- ggplot(
  mean_spectra_minpts50,
  aes(x = Frequency_kHz, y = mean_minmax_spectrum)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ HDBSCAN_cluster, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Min-Max Normalized Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "Faceted by cluster; minPts = 50; cluster 0 = noise/unassigned",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Mean min-max normalized amplitude"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_mean_spectra_faceted_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_mean_spectra_faceted.png"),
  p_mean_spectra_faceted_minpts50,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Mean spectra with SD ribbons, noise excluded
# ------------------------------------------------------------

p_mean_spectra_sd_minpts50 <- mean_spectra_minpts50 %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Frequency_kHz, y = mean_minmax_spectrum)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_minmax_spectrum - sd_minmax_spectrum,
      ymax = mean_minmax_spectrum + sd_minmax_spectrum
    ),
    fill = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ HDBSCAN_cluster, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Spectra with Variability by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "Mean ± 1 SD; 5PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50; noise excluded",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "Min-max normalized amplitude"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13)

print(p_mean_spectra_sd_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_mean_spectra_with_sd_ribbons_noise_excluded.png"),
  p_mean_spectra_sd_minpts50,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Stacked mean spectra, noise excluded
# ------------------------------------------------------------

stacked_spectra_minpts50 <- mean_spectra_minpts50 %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_numeric = as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    stacked_spectrum = mean_minmax_spectrum + cluster_numeric
  )

p_stacked_no_noise_minpts50 <- stacked_spectra_minpts50 %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = stacked_spectrum,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
      group = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors_50) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(stacked_spectra_minpts50$cluster_numeric)),
    labels = sort(unique(stacked_spectra_minpts50$HDBSCAN_cluster))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Stacked Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50; noise cluster removed",
    x = "Frequency (kHz)",
    y = "HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_stacked_no_noise_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_no_noise.png"),
  p_stacked_no_noise_minpts50,
  width = 4,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Drift composition table and plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

drift_composition_minpts50 <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  count(HDBSCAN_cluster, DriftID_spectra, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  mutate(percent_within_cluster = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(HDBSCAN_cluster, desc(n_clicks))

write.csv(
  drift_composition_minpts50,
  file.path(minpts50_table_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_drift_composition_by_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

top_drifts_minpts50 <- drift_composition_minpts50 %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  slice_max(n_clicks, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

p_top_drifts_minpts50 <- ggplot(
  top_drifts_minpts50,
  aes(
    x = n_clicks,
    y = reorder(DriftID_spectra, n_clicks),
    fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ HDBSCAN_cluster, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_50) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Contributing Drifts per HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
    x = "Number of clicks",
    y = "DriftID"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_top_drifts_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_top_drifts_per_cluster.png"),
  p_top_drifts_minpts50,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Event composition table and plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------

event_composition_minpts50 <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  count(HDBSCAN_cluster, EventID, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  mutate(percent_within_cluster = 100 * n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(HDBSCAN_cluster, desc(n_clicks))

write.csv(
  event_composition_minpts50,
  file.path(minpts50_table_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_event_composition_by_cluster.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

top_events_minpts50 <- event_composition_minpts50 %>%
  group_by(HDBSCAN_cluster) %>%
  slice_max(n_clicks, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

p_top_events_minpts50 <- ggplot(
  top_events_minpts50,
  aes(
    x = n_clicks,
    y = reorder(EventID, n_clicks),
    fill = HDBSCAN_cluster
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ HDBSCAN_cluster, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_50) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Contributing Events per HDBSCAN Cluster",
    subtitle = "5PC + 1x scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
    x = "Number of clicks",
    y = "EventID"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_top_events_minpts50)

ggsave(
  file.path(minpts50_plot_dir, "hdbscan_minPts50_top_events_per_cluster.png"),
  p_top_events_minpts50,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("\nSaved all minPts = 50 plots and tables to:\n")
cat(minpts50_dir, "\n")

```

--------------------------------------------------

# Map HDBSCAN cluster composition by event

## Setup

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(scatterpie)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input: drift/event latitude-longitude table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

adrift_detection_file <- "E:/Logs/ADRIFT_GgDetections.csv"

adrift_detections <- read_csv(adrift_detection_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

cat("Columns in ADRIFT_GgDetections:\n")
print(names(adrift_detections))

```

## Inspect location file contents

```{r}

cat("Rows in location file:", nrow(adrift_detections), "\n\n")

cat("Unique DriftName prefixes:\n")
print(
  adrift_detections %>%
    mutate(DriftPrefix = stringr::str_extract(DriftName, "^[^_]+")) %>%
    count(DriftPrefix, name = "n_rows") %>%
    arrange(DriftPrefix)
)

cat("\nUnique EventID prefixes:\n")
print(
  adrift_detections %>%
    mutate(EventPrefix = stringr::str_extract(EventID, "^[^_]+")) %>%
    count(EventPrefix, name = "n_rows") %>%
    arrange(EventPrefix)
)

cat("\nPreview across all drift types:\n")
print(
  adrift_detections %>%
    select(DriftName, EventID, Latitude, Longitude) %>%
    arrange(DriftName, EventID) %>%
    group_by(stringr::str_extract(DriftName, "^[^_]+")) %>%
    slice_head(n = 5) %>%
    ungroup()
)

```

## Sanity check: events and click counts used in final HDBSCAN

```{r}

hdbscan_event_click_counts <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  mutate(
    EventID = as.character(EventID),
    DriftID = stringr::str_remove(EventID, "_[0-9]+$"),
    EventPrefix = stringr::str_extract(EventID, "^[^_]+")
  ) %>%
  count(EventPrefix, DriftID, EventID, name = "n_clicks_used") %>%
  arrange(EventPrefix, DriftID, EventID)

cat("Total clicks in final HDBSCAN object:", sum(hdbscan_event_click_counts$n_clicks_used), "\n")
cat("Unique events used:", nrow(hdbscan_event_click_counts), "\n")
cat("Unique drifts used:", n_distinct(hdbscan_event_click_counts$DriftID), "\n\n")

cat("Events by prefix:\n")
print(
  hdbscan_event_click_counts %>%
    count(EventPrefix, name = "n_events")
)

cat("\nClick-count summary per event:\n")
print(summary(hdbscan_event_click_counts$n_clicks_used))

cat("\nFull event click-count table:\n")
print(hdbscan_event_click_counts, n = Inf)

```

##  Match final HDBSCAN events to location file using cleaned EventID

```{r}

hdbscan_event_click_counts_clean <- hdbscan_event_click_counts %>%
  mutate(
    EventID_clean = stringr::str_replace(EventID, "_Event_", "_"),
    DriftID_clean = stringr::str_remove(EventID_clean, "_[0-9]+$")
  )

event_locations <- adrift_detections %>%
  mutate(
    EventID_clean = as.character(EventID),
    Latitude = as.numeric(Latitude),
    Longitude = as.numeric(Longitude)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(EventID_clean),
    !is.na(Latitude),
    !is.na(Longitude)
  ) %>%
  select(EventID_clean, DriftName, Latitude, Longitude)

hdbscan_events_with_locations <- hdbscan_event_click_counts_clean %>%
  left_join(event_locations, by = "EventID_clean")

cat("HDBSCAN events:", nrow(hdbscan_event_click_counts_clean), "\n")
cat("Matched location rows:", sum(!is.na(hdbscan_events_with_locations$Latitude)), "\n")
cat("Missing location rows:", sum(is.na(hdbscan_events_with_locations$Latitude)), "\n\n")

cat("Missing events, if any:\n")
print(
  hdbscan_events_with_locations %>%
    filter(is.na(Latitude) | is.na(Longitude))
)

cat("\nMatched event coordinate preview:\n")
print(hdbscan_events_with_locations, n = Inf)

```

## Build event-level cluster composition tables

```{r}

event_cluster_counts <- hdbscan_minpts50_assignments %>%
  mutate(
    EventID = as.character(EventID),
    EventID_clean = stringr::str_replace(EventID, "_Event_", "_"),
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  ) %>%
  count(EventID, EventID_clean, HDBSCAN_cluster, name = "n_clicks") %>%
  left_join(
    hdbscan_events_with_locations %>%
      select(EventID, EventID_clean, DriftName, Latitude, Longitude),
    by = c("EventID", "EventID_clean")
  )

cat("Rows in event-cluster count table:", nrow(event_cluster_counts), "\n")
cat("Unique mapped events:", n_distinct(event_cluster_counts$EventID), "\n")
cat("Total clicks represented:", sum(event_cluster_counts$n_clicks), "\n\n")

cat("Cluster composition preview:\n")
print(head(event_cluster_counts, 30))

```

## Create wide pie-map tables

```{r}

event_pies_including_noise <- event_cluster_counts %>%
  select(EventID, EventID_clean, DriftName, Latitude, Longitude, HDBSCAN_cluster, n_clicks) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    values_from = n_clicks,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "cluster_"
  )

event_pies_excluding_noise <- event_cluster_counts %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0") %>%
  select(EventID, EventID_clean, DriftName, Latitude, Longitude, HDBSCAN_cluster, n_clicks) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = HDBSCAN_cluster,
    values_from = n_clicks,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "cluster_"
  )

cat("Including noise: events =", nrow(event_pies_including_noise), "\n")
cat("Excluding noise: events =", nrow(event_pies_excluding_noise), "\n\n")

cat("Including noise columns:\n")
print(names(event_pies_including_noise))

cat("\nExcluding noise columns:\n")
print(names(event_pies_excluding_noise))

cat("\nPreview including noise:\n")
print(head(event_pies_including_noise, 10))

cat("\nPreview excluding noise:\n")
print(head(event_pies_excluding_noise, 10))

```

## Add pie radius and save map-ready tables

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folders
# ------------------------------------------------------------

map_output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/minPts50_event_cluster_maps"

map_plot_dir <- file.path(map_output_dir, "plots")
map_table_dir <- file.path(map_output_dir, "tables")

dir.create(map_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(map_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Add pie radius
# ------------------------------------------------------------

add_pie_radius <- function(df) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(df)[stringr::str_detect(names(df), "^cluster_")]
  
  df %>%
    mutate(
      total_clicks_mapped = rowSums(across(all_of(cluster_cols))),
      pie_radius = sqrt(total_clicks_mapped) /
        max(sqrt(total_clicks_mapped), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.55
    )
}

event_pies_including_noise <- add_pie_radius(event_pies_including_noise)

event_pies_excluding_noise <- add_pie_radius(event_pies_excluding_noise)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write.csv(
  event_pies_including_noise,
  file.path(
    map_table_dir,
    "event_pie_map_data_including_noise.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  event_pies_excluding_noise,
  file.path(
    map_table_dir,
    "event_pie_map_data_excluding_noise.csv"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Including-noise total clicks:",
    sum(event_pies_including_noise$total_clicks_mapped), "\n")

cat("Excluding-noise total clicks:",
    sum(event_pies_excluding_noise$total_clicks_mapped), "\n\n")

cat("Pie radius summary including noise:\n")
print(summary(event_pies_including_noise$pie_radius))

cat("\nPie radius summary excluding noise:\n")
print(summary(event_pies_excluding_noise$pie_radius))

cat("\nSaved map-ready tables to:\n")
cat(map_table_dir, "\n")

```

## Build California Current basemap and pie-map function

```{r}

world <- rnaturalearth::ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

make_event_pie_map <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  xlim <- range(pie_data$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.5, 1.5)
  ylim <- range(pie_data$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.5, 1.5)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
      data = world,
      fill = "gray92",
      color = "gray60",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ) +
    coord_sf(
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim,
      expand = FALSE
    ) +
    scatterpie::geom_scatterpie(
      data = pie_data,
      aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, r = pie_radius),
      cols = cluster_cols,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.15,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event: Including Noise",
        "HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "Pies show proportional click membership per analyzed event",
      x = "Longitude",
      y = "Latitude",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray85", linewidth = 0.25),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 8.5,
    height = 7,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

```

## Generate both event pie maps

```{r}

make_event_pie_map <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  xlim <- range(pie_data$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.5, 1.5)
  ylim <- range(pie_data$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.5, 1.5)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray92", color = "gray60") +
    coord_sf(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim, expand = FALSE) +
    scatterpie::geom_scatterpie(
      data = pie_data,
      aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, r = pie_radius),
      cols = cluster_cols,
      color = "black",
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event: Including Noise",
        "HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "Pies show proportional click membership per analyzed event",
      x = "Longitude",
      y = "Latitude",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 8.5,
    height = 7,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

```

## Troubleshooting

```{r}

## Check map coordinate ranges

cat("Including noise longitude range:\n")
print(range(event_pies_including_noise$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE))

cat("Including noise latitude range:\n")
print(range(event_pies_including_noise$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE))

cat("\nRows with missing coordinates:\n")
print(
  event_pies_including_noise %>%
    filter(is.na(Longitude) | is.na(Latitude))
)

cat("\nCluster columns:\n")
print(names(event_pies_including_noise)[stringr::str_detect(names(event_pies_including_noise), "^cluster_")])

cat("\nFirst few map rows:\n")
print(head(event_pies_including_noise))

# Simple point map test

p_test_points <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray92", color = "gray60") +
  geom_point(
    data = event_pies_including_noise,
    aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude),
    size = 2
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = range(event_pies_including_noise$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-2, 2),
    ylim = range(event_pies_including_noise$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-2, 2),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p_test_points)

```

## Manual pie-map function, no scatterpie

```{r}

make_pie_slice_data <- function(pie_data, cluster_cols, radius_col = "pie_radius", n_points = 80) {
  
  out <- list()
  row_i <- 1
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pie_data))) {
    
    vals <- as.numeric(pie_data[i, cluster_cols])
    total <- sum(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    if (total <= 0) next
    
    props <- vals / total
    angle_starts <- c(0, cumsum(props)[-length(props)]) * 2 * pi
    angle_ends <- cumsum(props) * 2 * pi
    
    for (j in seq_along(cluster_cols)) {
      
      if (vals[j] <= 0) next
      
      angles <- seq(angle_starts[j], angle_ends[j], length.out = n_points)
      
      out[[row_i]] <- data.frame(
        EventID = pie_data$EventID[i],
        cluster = stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols[j], "cluster_"),
        Longitude = c(pie_data$Longitude[i], pie_data$Longitude[i] + pie_data[[radius_col]][i] * cos(angles)),
        Latitude  = c(pie_data$Latitude[i],  pie_data$Latitude[i]  + pie_data[[radius_col]][i] * sin(angles)),
        piece_id = paste0(pie_data$EventID[i], "_", cluster_cols[j])
      )
      
      row_i <- row_i + 1
    }
  }
  
  bind_rows(out)
}

make_event_pie_map <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  pie_slices <- make_pie_slice_data(
    pie_data = pie_data,
    cluster_cols = cluster_cols,
    radius_col = "pie_radius"
  )
  
  xlim <- range(pie_data$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.8, 1.8)
  ylim <- range(pie_data$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.8, 1.8)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray92", color = "gray60") +
    geom_polygon(
      data = pie_slices,
      aes(
        x = Longitude,
        y = Latitude,
        group = piece_id,
        fill = cluster
      ),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.12,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    coord_sf(
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim,
      expand = FALSE
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event: Including Noise",
        "HDBSCAN Cluster Composition by Event: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "Pies show proportional click membership per analyzed event",
      x = "Longitude",
      y = "Latitude",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 8.5,
    height = 7,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

```

## Generate both manual event pie maps

```{r}

p_event_map_including_noise <- make_event_pie_map(
  pie_data = event_pies_including_noise,
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_event_pie_map_including_noise_manual.png"
)

p_event_map_excluding_noise <- make_event_pie_map(
  pie_data = event_pies_excluding_noise,
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_event_pie_map_excluding_noise_manual.png"
)

print(p_event_map_including_noise)
print(p_event_map_excluding_noise)

cat("Saved maps to:\n")
cat(map_plot_dir, "\n")

```

## Smaller circular pies

```{r}

make_pie_slice_data <- function(pie_data, cluster_cols, radius_col = "pie_radius", n_points = 80) {
  
  out <- list()
  row_i <- 1
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pie_data))) {
    
    vals <- as.numeric(pie_data[i, cluster_cols])
    total <- sum(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    if (total <= 0) next
    
    props <- vals / total
    angle_starts <- c(0, cumsum(props)[-length(props)]) * 2 * pi
    angle_ends <- cumsum(props) * 2 * pi
    
    lat_center <- pie_data$Latitude[i]
    lon_center <- pie_data$Longitude[i]
    
    # Correct longitude radius so pies look circular on lon/lat map
    lon_correction <- 1 / cos(lat_center * pi / 180)
    
    r_lat <- pie_data[[radius_col]][i]
    r_lon <- r_lat * lon_correction
    
    for (j in seq_along(cluster_cols)) {
      
      if (vals[j] <= 0) next
      
      angles <- seq(angle_starts[j], angle_ends[j], length.out = n_points)
      
      out[[row_i]] <- data.frame(
        EventID = pie_data$EventID[i],
        cluster = stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols[j], "cluster_"),
        Longitude = c(lon_center, lon_center + r_lon * cos(angles)),
        Latitude  = c(lat_center, lat_center + r_lat * sin(angles)),
        piece_id = paste0(pie_data$EventID[i], "_", cluster_cols[j])
      )
      
      row_i <- row_i + 1
    }
  }
  
  bind_rows(out)
}

# Shrink pies
event_pies_including_noise <- event_pies_including_noise %>%
  mutate(pie_radius = pie_radius * 0.45)

event_pies_excluding_noise <- event_pies_excluding_noise %>%
  mutate(pie_radius = pie_radius * 0.45)

p_event_map_including_noise <- make_event_pie_map(
  pie_data = event_pies_including_noise,
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_event_pie_map_including_noise_manual_smaller_circular.png"
)

p_event_map_excluding_noise <- make_event_pie_map(
  pie_data = event_pies_excluding_noise,
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_event_pie_map_excluding_noise_manual_smaller_circular.png"
)

print(p_event_map_including_noise)
print(p_event_map_excluding_noise)

```

## Stacked bar charts of event-level cluster proportions by longitude

```{r}

make_event_stacked_barplot <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  bar_data <- pie_data %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = paste0(EventID_clean, "\n", round(abs(Longitude), 1), "°W")
    ) %>%
    arrange(Longitude) %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = factor(Event_label, levels = Event_label)
    ) %>%
    select(EventID, EventID_clean, Event_label, Longitude, Latitude, all_of(cluster_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(cluster_cols),
      names_to = "cluster",
      values_to = "n_clicks"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      cluster = stringr::str_remove(cluster, "cluster_")
    ) %>%
    group_by(EventID, EventID_clean, Event_label, Longitude, Latitude) %>%
    mutate(
      prop_clicks = n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  p <- ggplot(
    bar_data,
    aes(
      x = Event_label,
      y = prop_clicks,
      fill = cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Proportions: Including Noise",
        "Event-Level HDBSCAN Cluster Proportions: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "Events sorted west-to-east by longitude",
      x = "Event / Longitude",
      y = "Clicks per cluster (%)",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 6),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 14,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

p_bar_including_noise <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  pie_data = event_pies_including_noise,
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_event_stacked_barplot_including_noise.png"
)

p_bar_excluding_noise <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  pie_data = event_pies_excluding_noise,
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_event_stacked_barplot_excluding_noise.png"
)

print(p_bar_including_noise)
print(p_bar_excluding_noise)

```

## Stacked mean spectra with map/bar colors

```{r}

cluster_colors_consistent <- c(
  "0" = "#F8766D",
  "1" = "#A3A500",
  "2" = "#00BF7D",
  "3" = "#00B0F6",
  "4" = "#E76BF3"
)

# Use whichever spectra-summary object exists
spectra_summary_for_plot <- if (exists("mean_spectra_minpts50")) {
  mean_spectra_minpts50
} else {
  cluster_spectra_summary
}

spectra_summary_for_plot <- spectra_summary_for_plot %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)
  )

make_stacked_spectra_plot <- function(include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  plot_data <- spectra_summary_for_plot
  
  if (!include_noise) {
    plot_data <- plot_data %>%
      filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")
  }
  
  cluster_order <- sort(as.numeric(unique(plot_data$HDBSCAN_cluster)))
  
  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(HDBSCAN_cluster, levels = as.character(cluster_order)),
      offset = as.numeric(HDBSCAN_cluster),
      
      # Vertical emphasis: increases peak/notch visibility without changing cluster ordering
      stacked_spectrum = offset + mean_minmax_spectrum * 1.25
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = stacked_spectrum,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
      group = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors_consistent) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = cluster_order,
      labels = cluster_order
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "Stacked Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster: Including Noise",
        "Stacked Mean Spectra by HDBSCAN Cluster: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI; minPts = 50; vertical emphasis applied",
      x = "Frequency (kHz)",
      y = "HDBSCAN cluster",
      color = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 4.2,
    height = 9.5,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

p_spectra_including_noise <- make_stacked_spectra_plot(
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_including_noise_matching_colors.png"
)

p_spectra_excluding_noise <- make_stacked_spectra_plot(
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_excluding_noise_matching_colors.png"
)

print(p_spectra_including_noise)
print(p_spectra_excluding_noise)

```

## Fix cut-off title/subtitle on stacked spectra

```{r}

make_stacked_spectra_plot <- function(include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  plot_data <- spectra_summary_for_plot
  
  if (!include_noise) {
    plot_data <- plot_data %>%
      filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")
  }
  
  cluster_order <- sort(as.numeric(unique(plot_data$HDBSCAN_cluster)))
  
  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(HDBSCAN_cluster, levels = as.character(cluster_order)),
      offset = as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)),
      stacked_spectrum = offset + mean_minmax_spectrum * 1.25
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = stacked_spectrum,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
      group = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors_consistent) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = cluster_order,
      labels = cluster_order
    ) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "Mean Spectra: Including Noise",
        "Mean Spectra: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
      x = "Frequency (kHz)",
      y = "HDBSCAN cluster",
      color = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(15, 20, 15, 15),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 6.2,
    height = 9.5,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

p_spectra_including_noise <- make_stacked_spectra_plot(
  include_noise = TRUE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_including_noise_matching_colors_fixed.png"
)

p_spectra_excluding_noise <- make_stacked_spectra_plot(
  include_noise = FALSE,
  output_name = "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_excluding_noise_matching_colors_fixed.png"
)

print(p_spectra_including_noise)
print(p_spectra_excluding_noise)

```

## Re-generate maps, stacked barplots, and spectra with consistent colors

```{r}

cluster_colors_consistent <- c(
  "0" = "gray60",   # noise/unassigned
  "1" = "#F8766D", # dark blue
  "2" = "#7CAE00", # green
  "3" = "#1FBFCF", # cyan
  "4" = "#C77CFF"  # purple
)

# ============================================================
# 1. MAPS
# ============================================================

make_event_pie_map <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  pie_slices <- make_pie_slice_data(
    pie_data = pie_data,
    cluster_cols = cluster_cols,
    radius_col = "pie_radius"
  )
  
  xlim <- range(pie_data$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.8, 1.8)
  ylim <- range(pie_data$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.8, 1.8)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray92", color = "gray60") +
    geom_polygon(
      data = pie_slices,
      aes(
        x = Longitude,
        y = Latitude,
        group = piece_id,
        fill = cluster
      ),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.12,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_consistent) +
    coord_sf(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim, expand = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(include_noise, "Event Pies: Including Noise", "Event Pies: Excluding Noise"),
      subtitle = "Proportional HDBSCAN cluster membership per analyzed event",
      x = "Longitude",
      y = "Latitude",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
  
  ggsave(file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name), p, width = 8.5, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  return(p)
}

p_map_including_noise <- make_event_pie_map(
  event_pies_including_noise,
  TRUE,
  "hdbscan_event_pie_map_including_noise_final_colors.png"
)

p_map_excluding_noise <- make_event_pie_map(
  event_pies_excluding_noise,
  FALSE,
  "hdbscan_event_pie_map_excluding_noise_final_colors.png"
)

# ============================================================
# 2. STACKED BARPLOTS
# ============================================================

make_event_stacked_barplot <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  bar_data <- pie_data %>%
    mutate(
      Event_label = paste0(EventID_clean, "\n", round(abs(Longitude), 1), "°W")
    ) %>%
    arrange(Longitude) %>%
    mutate(Event_label = factor(Event_label, levels = Event_label)) %>%
    select(EventID, EventID_clean, Event_label, Longitude, Latitude, all_of(cluster_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(cluster_cols),
      names_to = "cluster",
      values_to = "n_clicks"
    ) %>%
    mutate(cluster = stringr::str_remove(cluster, "cluster_")) %>%
    group_by(EventID, EventID_clean, Event_label, Longitude, Latitude) %>%
    mutate(prop_clicks = n_clicks / sum(n_clicks)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  p <- ggplot(bar_data, aes(x = Event_label, y = prop_clicks, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_consistent) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(include_noise, "Cluster Proportions by Event: Including Noise", "Cluster Proportions by Event: Excluding Noise"),
      subtitle = "Events sorted west-to-east by longitude",
      x = "Event / Longitude",
      y = "Clicks per cluster (%)",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 6),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  ggsave(file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name), p, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  return(p)
}

p_bar_including_noise <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  event_pies_including_noise,
  TRUE,
  "hdbscan_event_stacked_barplot_including_noise_final_colors.png"
)

p_bar_excluding_noise <- make_event_stacked_barplot(
  event_pies_excluding_noise,
  FALSE,
  "hdbscan_event_stacked_barplot_excluding_noise_final_colors.png"
)

# ============================================================
# 3. STACKED MEAN SPECTRA
# ============================================================

spectra_summary_for_plot <- if (exists("mean_spectra_minpts50")) {
  mean_spectra_minpts50
} else {
  cluster_spectra_summary
}

spectra_summary_for_plot <- spectra_summary_for_plot %>%
  mutate(HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster))

make_stacked_spectra_plot <- function(include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  plot_data <- spectra_summary_for_plot
  
  if (!include_noise) {
    plot_data <- plot_data %>% filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")
  }
  
  cluster_order <- sort(as.numeric(unique(plot_data$HDBSCAN_cluster)))
  
  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(
      HDBSCAN_cluster = factor(HDBSCAN_cluster, levels = as.character(cluster_order)),
      offset = as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster)),
      stacked_spectrum = offset + mean_minmax_spectrum * 1.25
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Frequency_kHz,
      y = stacked_spectrum,
      color = HDBSCAN_cluster,
      group = HDBSCAN_cluster
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors_consistent) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = cluster_order, labels = cluster_order) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(include_noise, "Mean Spectra: Including Noise", "Mean Spectra: Excluding Noise"),
      subtitle = "5PC + scaled logICI; minPts = 50",
      x = "Frequency (kHz)",
      y = "HDBSCAN cluster",
      color = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(15, 20, 15, 15)
    )
  
  ggsave(file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name), p, width = 6.2, height = 9.5, dpi = 300)
  return(p)
}

p_spectra_including_noise <- make_stacked_spectra_plot(
  TRUE,
  "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_including_noise_final_colors.png"
)

p_spectra_excluding_noise <- make_stacked_spectra_plot(
  FALSE,
  "hdbscan_minPts50_stacked_mean_spectra_excluding_noise_final_colors.png"
)

print(p_map_including_noise)
print(p_map_excluding_noise)
print(p_bar_including_noise)
print(p_bar_excluding_noise)
print(p_spectra_including_noise)
print(p_spectra_excluding_noise)

```

## Big event pie maps with gray noise + matching cluster colors

```{r}

cluster_colors_consistent <- c(
  "0" = "gray60",   # noise/unassigned
  "1" = "#F8766D", # red
  "2" = "#7CAE00", # green
  "3" = "#1FBFCF", # cyan
  "4" = "#C77CFF"  # purple
)

# Rebuild radii fresh so pies are big again
add_pie_radius_custom <- function(df, max_radius = 0.50) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(df)[stringr::str_detect(names(df), "^cluster_")]
  
  df %>%
    mutate(
      total_clicks_mapped = rowSums(across(all_of(cluster_cols))),
      pie_radius = sqrt(total_clicks_mapped) /
        max(sqrt(total_clicks_mapped), na.rm = TRUE) * max_radius
    )
}

event_pies_including_noise_big <- add_pie_radius_custom(
  event_pies_including_noise,
  max_radius = 0.50
)

event_pies_excluding_noise_big <- add_pie_radius_custom(
  event_pies_excluding_noise,
  max_radius = 0.42
)

make_event_pie_map_big <- function(pie_data, include_noise = TRUE, output_name) {
  
  cluster_cols <- names(pie_data)[stringr::str_detect(names(pie_data), "^cluster_")]
  cluster_cols <- cluster_cols[
    order(as.numeric(stringr::str_remove(cluster_cols, "cluster_")))
  ]
  
  pie_slices <- make_pie_slice_data(
    pie_data = pie_data,
    cluster_cols = cluster_cols,
    radius_col = "pie_radius"
  )
  
  xlim <- range(pie_data$Longitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.8, 1.8)
  ylim <- range(pie_data$Latitude, na.rm = TRUE) + c(-1.8, 1.8)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray92", color = "gray60") +
    geom_polygon(
      data = pie_slices,
      aes(
        x = Longitude,
        y = Latitude,
        group = piece_id,
        fill = cluster
      ),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.12,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors_consistent) +
    coord_sf(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim, expand = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = ifelse(
        include_noise,
        "Event Pies: Including Noise",
        "Event Pies: Excluding Noise"
      ),
      subtitle = "Proportional HDBSCAN cluster membership per analyzed event",
      x = "Longitude",
      y = "Latitude",
      fill = "HDBSCAN cluster"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    file.path(map_plot_dir, output_name),
    p,
    width = 8.5,
    height = 7,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

p_map_including_noise_big <- make_event_pie_map_big(
  event_pies_including_noise_big,
  TRUE,
  "hdbscan_event_pie_map_including_noise_big_matching_colors.png"
)

p_map_excluding_noise_big <- make_event_pie_map_big(
  event_pies_excluding_noise_big,
  FALSE,
  "hdbscan_event_pie_map_excluding_noise_big_matching_colors.png"
)

print(p_map_including_noise_big)
print(p_map_excluding_noise_big)

```

## Drift-Level plotting

```{r}



```

## Drift-level cluster composition maps and stacked plots

```{r}

# ============================================================
# DRIFT-LEVEL PIE MAPS + STACKED COMPOSITION PLOTS
# Same style as original event-level workflow
# ============================================================

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folders: same parent folder as event-level maps
# ------------------------------------------------------------

map_output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/minPts50_event_cluster_maps"
map_plot_dir  <- file.path(map_output_dir, "plots")
map_table_dir <- file.path(map_output_dir, "tables")

dir.create(map_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(map_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
```
